about: Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Medical Oncologist with 24 years of experience in treating hematological malignancies and solid tumors at Apollo Hospitals, Jubilee Hills. He completed his MBBS from AIIMS Delhi and pursued his MD in Internal Medicine from the same institution, followed by a DM in Medical Oncology from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Sharma holds certifications in Chemotherapy Administration and Immunotherapy from international bodies. He has pioneered the implementation of targeted therapy protocols in Telangana and published over 45 peer-reviewed research papers on lymphomas and leukemia management. His expertise includes complex chemotherapy regimens, bone marrow transplantation coordination, and personalized cancer treatment planning. Dr. Sharma is recognized for his compassionate patient care and has trained over 50 oncology residents throughout his career.

Dr. Priya Mehta is an accomplished Surgical Oncologist with 18 years of specialized experience in breast cancer, gastrointestinal malignancies, and surgical oncology procedures. She earned her MBBS from CMC Vellore and completed her MS in General Surgery from the same prestigious institution, followed by MCh in Surgical Oncology from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Mehta is fellowship-trained in minimally invasive oncological procedures from Apollo Hospitals itself. She has successfully performed over 3,000 oncological surgeries and is known for her expertise in breast conservation surgery and sentinel lymph node biopsy techniques. Dr. Mehta has been invited speaker at national and international cancer conferences and actively mentors junior surgical trainees in advanced laparoscopic oncological techniques.

Dr. Anil Reddy Gopal is a highly experienced Radiation Oncologist with 22 years of expertise in advanced radiotherapy and brachytherapy at Apollo Hospitals, Jubilee Hills. He completed his MBBS from Osmania Medical College and his MD in Radiation Oncology from NIMS Hyderabad, supplemented by specialized fellowships in Intensity-Modulated Radiation Therapy (IMRT) and stereotactic body radiotherapy from international institutions. Dr. Gopal is proficient in handling complex cases involving head and neck cancers, cervical cancers, and thoracic malignancies. He has implemented cutting-edge radiation planning techniques and has contributed to multiple clinical trials in precision oncology. With extensive experience in image-guided radiotherapy and proton therapy protocols, Dr. Reddy has significantly improved treatment outcomes and reduced radiation-induced morbidity in over 8,000 patients.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Mehra is a distinguished Critical Care Physician at Apollo Hospitals, Jubilee Hills with 24 years of specialized experience in Medical Intensive Care. He graduated from AIIMS Delhi and completed his MD in Internal Medicine from Maulana Azad Medical College, followed by a DM in Critical Care Medicine from CMC Vellore. Dr. Mehra holds certifications in Advanced Critical Care from Harvard Medical School and is an expert in managing sepsis, acute respiratory distress syndrome, and multiorgan failure. He has published over 35 research papers in reputed journals and has led several quality improvement initiatives for ICU protocols. His expertise extends to managing post-operative complications and cardiac emergencies with a patient survival rate consistently above national averages.

Dr. Neha Sinha is an accomplished Critical Care Anesthesiologist with 18 years of experience in managing complex perioperative and critical patients. She obtained her MD in Anesthesiology from JIPMER Puducherry and pursued a DM in Critical Care Medicine from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Sinha is specially trained in advanced airway management, mechanical ventilation strategies, and hemodynamic monitoring. She is internationally certified in Extracorporeal Life Support (ECLS) and holds credentials from the American Society of Critical Care Anesthesiologists. Her clinical focus includes trauma management, acute coronary syndrome, and complications arising from prolonged ventilation. She has trained over 50 post-graduate residents and is known for her compassionate patient care approach.

Dr. Vikram Srivastava is a highly experienced Neurointensive Care specialist with 22 years of dedicated practice in managing critically ill neurological patients. He completed his MBBS from Osmania Medical College and earned his MD in Neurology from Gandhi Medical College, followed by a DM in Neurological Critical Care from KEM Mumbai. Dr. Srivastava is an expert in managing stroke, traumatic brain injury, status epilepticus, and neurosurgical post-operative complications. He holds multiple international certifications including Neurocritical Care Board Certification and has been a visiting faculty at prestigious institutions across India and Southeast Asia. He has contributed significantly to neurointensive care protocols and disaster management planning, making him a sought-after consultant for complex neuro-critical cases.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a highly experienced nephrologist with 24 years of clinical expertise in kidney transplantation and immunosuppressive therapy. He completed his MBBS from AIIMS Delhi followed by MD in Internal Medicine from the same institution. Subsequently, he pursued his DM Nephrology from NIMS Hyderabad, where he developed specialization in renal transplantation. Dr. Sharma holds certifications in transplant immunology from the American Society of Transplantation and has completed a fellowship in kidney transplantation at a premier center in Chennai. He has successfully coordinated over 800 transplant procedures and has published extensively on post-transplant complications and long-term allograft survival. His research contributions have earned him recognition as a thought leader in transplant nephrology within South India.

Dr. Priya Deshmukh is a distinguished nephrologist specializing in dialysis management and vascular access creation with 18 years of dedicated experience. She earned her MBBS from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad, and completed her MD in Internal Medicine from the same institution. Her DM in Nephrology was obtained from CMC Vellore, one of India's most prestigious medical institutions. Dr. Deshmukh is an expert in interventional nephrology, including fistula creation and maintenance, and holds certification in peritoneal dialysis training. She has mentored numerous fellows and technicians in dialysis techniques and has implemented several quality improvement initiatives in hemodialysis units. Her contributions to reducing infection rates in dialysis patients have been presented at multiple national conferences.

Dr. Arun Krishnan is a leading nephrologist with 22 years of expertise in chronic kidney disease management and diabetic nephropathy. He completed his MBBS from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, followed by MD in Internal Medicine from JIPMER, Puducherry. His DM in Nephrology was pursued at NIMS Hyderabad with a focus on renal pathology and clinical correlation. Dr. Krishnan has completed advanced fellowships in diabetic kidney disease and holds certifications from the International Society of Nephrology. He has established comprehensive CKD care programs and preventive nephrology clinics, significantly reducing progression to end-stage renal disease in his patient cohort. His research on novel biomarkers for CKD progression has been published in peer-reviewed journals and cited internationally.

Dr. Sneha Banerjee is an accomplished nephrologist with 15 years of experience in acute kidney injury management and critical care nephrology. She obtained her MBBS from KEM Hospital, Mumbai, and completed her MD in Internal Medicine from the University of Mumbai. Her specialized DM in Nephrology was from AIIMS Delhi with post-doctoral research in acute renal failure mechanisms. Dr. Banerjee is proficient in continuous renal replacement therapy (CRRT) and has expertise in managing complex cases of rhabdomyolysis and sepsis-induced AKI. She holds certifications in critical care nephrology and has been instrumental in establishing high-acuity kidney care units. Her innovative approaches to fluid management in critically ill patients and contributions to guideline development have made her a recognized expert in critical care nephrology.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished gastroenterologist with over 22 years of clinical experience in hepatology and liver diseases. He graduated from AIIMS Delhi and completed his MD in Gastroenterology from NIMS Hyderabad, followed by a DM in Hepatology from CMC Vellore. Dr. Sharma is certified by the Indian Board of Gastroenterology and has completed advanced fellowships in minimally invasive hepatic interventions from international institutions. He specializes in managing cirrhosis, viral hepatitis, liver transplantation assessment, and advanced endoscopic therapy. Dr. Sharma has published over 35 research papers in peer-reviewed journals and has been instrumental in establishing the liver clinic at Apollo Hospitals. His expertise in ERCP and hepatic ultrasound elastography has earned him recognition as one of the leading hepatologists in Hyderabad.

Dr. Priya Narasimhan brings 18 years of dedicated expertise in gastroesophageal reflux disease, motility disorders, and functional gastrointestinal conditions. She obtained her MBBS from Osmania Medical College and MD in Gastroenterology from JIPMER Puducherry, followed by a specialized fellowship in neurogastroenterology from KEM Mumbai. Dr. Narasimhan is skilled in esophageal manometry, impedance-pH monitoring, and therapeutic endoscopy for complex esophageal pathology. She holds certifications in advanced endoscopic ultrasound and has trained numerous residents in diagnostic and therapeutic procedures. Her patient-centric approach and expertise in managing refractory reflux disease with endoscopic interventions have made her a preferred specialist. Dr. Narasimhan has presented her research at international conferences and actively mentors junior gastroenterologists.

Dr. Vikram Singh Reddy is a highly skilled interventional gastroenterologist with 25 years of experience, specializing in gastrointestinal malignancies and pancreaticobiliary disorders. He completed his MBBS from Gandhi Medical College and pursued his MD in Gastroenterology and DM in Interventional Endoscopy from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Reddy is proficient in complex ERCP procedures, pancreatic stent placement, ampullary management, and diagnostic/therapeutic cholangiopancreatography. He has undergone fellowship training in therapeutic endoscopy across premier institutions in the United States and Europe. With over 3,000 successful ERCP procedures, Dr. Reddy is recognized for managing the most challenging biliopancreatic cases. He regularly conducts workshops on advanced endoscopic techniques and has contributed significantly to gastroenterology literature with numerous publications in indexed journals.

Dr. Anjali Menon is an accomplished gastroenterologist with 14 years of specialized experience in inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), colorectal cancer screening, and therapeutic colonoscopy. She graduated from CMC Vellore and obtained her MD in Gastroenterology from AIIMS Delhi, complemented by a DM in Gastroenterology from NIMS Hyderabad with focus on IBD management. Dr. Menon is certified in advanced endoscopic ultrasound and endoscopic mucosal resection techniques. She has completed specialized training in IBD management and biologics therapy from international institutions. Dr. Menon is an active member of the Indian IBD Study Group and has contributed to several multicenter clinical trials. Her compassionate approach to IBD patient care and proficiency in high-definition colonoscopy with chromoendoscopy make her a valued member of the gastroenterology department, particularly for preventive and therapeutic colonoscopic interventions.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a highly experienced General Surgeon with 22 years of clinical expertise, specializing in Advanced Laparoscopic and Bariatric Surgery. He graduated from AIIMS Delhi with an MS in General Surgery and completed his MCh in Minimal Access Surgery from CMC Vellore. Dr. Sharma is a certified fellow of the Indian Association of Gastrointestinal Endoscopic Surgeons and has successfully performed over 3,000 minimally invasive procedures. He has published numerous peer-reviewed articles in national and international journals and is a recipient of the prestigious 'Best Surgical Innovation Award' from the Indian Surgical Association in 2019. His expertise in weight loss surgery has transformed the lives of hundreds of patients across Hyderabad.

Dr. Priya Menon brings 18 years of outstanding experience in Surgical Oncology and Hepato-Pancreato-Biliary (HPB) Surgery. She obtained her MD from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad, followed by an MS in General Surgery from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Menon completed her specialized MCh training in Surgical Oncology from Tata Memorial Centre, Mumbai. She is an expert in complex liver resections, pancreatic surgeries, and colorectal cancer management. With over 1,200 major HPB procedures to her credit, she has established herself as a leading HPB surgeon in Telangana. Dr. Menon is actively involved in cancer research and has mentored numerous surgical residents in advanced oncological techniques.

Dr. Vikram Patel is an accomplished Trauma and Emergency Surgeon with 16 years of extensive experience managing complex trauma cases and emergency surgical conditions. He completed his MBBS from GMC Gandhinagar and MS in General Surgery from KEM Mumbai. Dr. Patel holds a Diploma in Trauma Surgery from the American College of Surgeons and is certified in Advanced Trauma Life Support (ATLS) and Surgical Critical Care. He has successfully managed over 5,000 trauma cases and is instrumental in establishing trauma protocols at Apollo Hospitals. His dedication to emergency surgical care and his exceptional clinical judgment have earned him recognition as one of Hyderabad's premier trauma surgeons with multiple institutional awards.

Dr. Anjali Desai is a distinguished endocrine and thyroid surgeon with 20 years of specialized surgical experience. She graduated from JIPMER Puducherry with an MS in General Surgery and completed her MCh in Endocrine Surgery from Chennai Institute of Oncology. Dr. Desai is an expert in thyroid cancer management, parathyroid surgery, and adrenal pathologies. She has trained extensively in Robotic Thyroid Surgery and has performed over 2,500 thyroid procedures with exceptional complication rates. Dr. Desai is an active member of the Indian Association of Endocrine Surgeons and has presented her research at international conferences. Her innovative surgical techniques and patient-centric approach have established her as a leader in endocrine surgery in South India.

Dr. Suresh Reddy Yadav is an experienced Vascular Surgeon with 24 years of comprehensive expertise in peripheral vascular disease, aortic aneurysms, and vascular trauma. He obtained his MBBS from Osmania Medical College and MS in General Surgery from NIMS Hyderabad, followed by specialized training in Vascular Surgery at All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Delhi. Dr. Yadav is proficient in both open and endovascular surgical techniques and has successfully managed over 2,800 vascular cases. He holds certifications in Vascular Surgery from the Indian College of Surgeons and is recognized for his contributions to peripheral vascular disease management in India. His expertise in complex aortic pathologies has made him a sought-after consultant across Hyderabad.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Orthopedic Surgeon specializing in Joint Replacement Surgery and Arthroscopy at Apollo Hospitals, Jubilee Hills. With 28 years of clinical experience, he holds an MS in Orthopedic Surgery from AIIMS Delhi and an MCh in Joint Replacement from CMC Vellore. He completed his Fellowship in Advanced Arthroscopy from the prestigious Rothman Institute, USA, and is a member of the Indian Orthopedic Association and Asia-Pacific Orthopedic Association. Dr. Sharma has performed over 12,000 successful joint replacement surgeries and is recognized for his pioneering minimally invasive arthroscopic techniques. He has published 45+ research papers in national and international journals and regularly conducts training workshops for young orthopedic surgeons. His expertise in computer-assisted joint surgery and robotic-assisted arthroplasty has earned him national acclaim.

Dr. Priya Sharma Reddy is an accomplished Orthopedic Surgeon with a special focus on Sports Medicine and Ligament Reconstruction at Apollo Hospitals, Jubilee Hills. She obtained her MBBS from Osmania Medical College and MS in Orthopedics from NIMS Hyderabad with 18 years of dedicated experience. Dr. Reddy completed her Fellowship in Sports Medicine from the American Sports Medicine Institute, Birmingham, and holds certification from the American Board of Orthopedic Surgery. She has successfully treated numerous athletes from professional sports teams across India and has performed over 3,000 arthroscopic procedures. Known for her expertise in ACL reconstruction, meniscal repairs, and shoulder instability treatment, she is an active member of the Sports Orthopedic Society of India and has authored 30+ publications.

Dr. Arun Krishnan Nair is a renowned Orthopedic Surgeon specializing in Spine Surgery and Trauma at Apollo Hospitals, Jubilee Hills, with 25 years of extensive experience in complex spinal conditions. A graduate of JIPMER, Puducherry, he holds an MS in Orthopedics and an MCh in Spine Surgery from CMC Vellore. Dr. Nair completed his Fellowship in Advanced Spine Surgery from the Aarhus University Hospital, Denmark, and is certified by the European Spine Society. He has mastered minimally invasive spinal techniques, vertebroplasty, and complex trauma management, having successfully performed over 8,000 spinal procedures. His research on degenerative disc disease has been published in prestigious international journals. Dr. Nair is a sought-after speaker at orthopedic conferences and serves as a mentor to emerging spine surgeons across India.

Dr. Meera Kapoor is an exceptional Orthopedic Surgeon with specialized expertise in Pediatric Orthopedics and Musculoskeletal Disorders at Apollo Hospitals, Jubilee Hills. She completed her MBBS from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, followed by MS in Orthopedics from KEM Mumbai and DM in Pediatric Orthopedics from AIIMS Delhi with 16 years of clinical practice. Dr. Kapoor holds certification from the International Association of Pediatric Orthopedic Surgery (IAPOS) and has completed advanced training at Boston Children's Hospital, USA. She specializes in treating congenital deformities, clubfoot management using innovative techniques, and juvenile scoliosis correction. With over 5,000 pediatric orthopedic cases handled, she has established a specialized clinic for developmental orthopedic disorders. Dr. Kapoor is passionate about training pediatric orthopedic surgeons and has published 25+ papers on pediatric orthopedic management.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a senior consultant cardiologist with 28 years of experience in interventional cardiology and coronary artery disease management. He completed his MD in General Medicine from AIIMS Delhi, followed by DM in Cardiology from Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER), Chandigarh. Dr. Sharma holds additional fellowships in interventional cardiology from Europe and has successfully performed over 15,000 coronary interventions. He specializes in complex coronary angioplasty, chronic total occlusion interventions, and acute coronary syndrome management. His research has been published in several national and international cardiology journals. Dr. Sharma is recognized for his expertise in training residents and fellows in advanced interventional techniques at Apollo Hospitals, Jubilee Hills.

Dr. Priya Menon Iyer is an accomplished cardiologist with 18 years of specialized experience in cardiac electrophysiology and arrhythmia management. She earned her MD in Medicine from Christian Medical College (CMC), Vellore, and completed her DM in Cardiology from NIMS Hyderabad. She holds additional certifications in electrophysiology from leading cardiac centers in the United States and Europe. Dr. Iyer is proficient in radiofrequency ablation, device implantation (pacemakers, ICDs, and CRT devices), and management of complex arrhythmias. She has published extensively in peer-reviewed journals and is actively involved in training physicians in electrophysiology at Apollo Hospitals. Her compassionate approach to patient care makes her highly sought after.

Dr. Vikram Reddy Nayak is a distinguished consultant cardiologist with 22 years of expertise in structural heart disease and echocardiography. He completed his MD from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad, and earned his DM in Cardiology from JIPMER, Puducherry. Additionally, he holds an MCh in cardiac surgery and is a certified expert in transesophageal echocardiography (TEE) and percutaneous structural interventions. Dr. Nayak specializes in left atrial appendage closure, mitral valve repair/replacement guidance, and complex congenital heart disease management in adults. He has trained extensively at premier cardiac centers globally and brings cutting-edge techniques to Apollo Hospitals. His multidisciplinary approach has significantly improved patient outcomes.

Dr. Ananya Bhattacharya is a leading cardiologist with 16 years of focused expertise in heart failure management and cardiac transplantation. She obtained her MD in Internal Medicine from KEM Hospital and Seth G.S. Medical College, Mumbai, and completed her DM in Cardiology from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad. Dr. Bhattacharya holds specialized certifications in advanced heart failure and transplant cardiology from international institutions. She is proficient in mechanical circulatory support devices, left ventricular assist devices (LVAD), and comprehensive heart failure management protocols. Her research on novel therapeutic approaches in dilated cardiomyopathy has been recognized internationally. She leads the advanced heart failure clinic at Apollo Hospitals and serves as a mentor for fellows in cardiology.

Dr. Sanjay Patel Desai is an esteemed consultant cardiologist with 25 years of comprehensive experience in preventive cardiology and non-invasive cardiac imaging. He completed his MD from NIMS Hyderabad and DM in Cardiology from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Desai is an expert in advanced imaging modalities including cardiac CT, advanced echocardiography, and stress testing, with additional certifications from American College of Radiology. He specializes in cardiovascular risk stratification, preventive cardiology, and management of complex valvular heart disease. Dr. Desai has established evidence-based protocols for cardiac screening and prevention at Apollo Hospitals. His dedication to patient education and lifestyle modification has earned him the recognition as one of the most trusted preventive cardiologists in Hyderabad.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Pulmonologist with 28 years of clinical experience in respiratory medicine and sleep disorders. He completed his MBBS from AIIMS Delhi followed by MD in Pulmonology from Delhi University. He holds a DM in Sleep Medicine from CMC Vellore and is a Fellow of the American College of Chest Physicians (FCCP). His expertise encompasses chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), interstitial lung diseases, and advanced sleep apnea management. Dr. Sharma has published over 40 research papers in national and international journals and has been instrumental in establishing the Sleep Medicine Unit at Apollo Hospitals, Jubilee Hills. He is an accomplished bronchoscopist with expertise in endobronchial ultrasound (EBUS) and has trained numerous junior physicians in advanced pulmonary procedures.

Dr. Priya Menon Krishnan is a renowned interventional pulmonologist with 16 years of dedicated experience in chest medicine. She obtained her MBBS from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad, and completed her MD in Pulmonology from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Krishnan pursued a specialized fellowship in Interventional Pulmonology from leading centers in North India. She specializes in bronchoscopic procedures, transbronchial needle aspiration (TBNA), rigid bronchoscopy for foreign body removal, and pleural procedures. Her clinical interests include lung cancer diagnosis and management, bronchiectasis, and complex airway management. Dr. Krishnan is an active member of the Indian Chest Society and has conducted numerous workshops on advanced bronchoscopic techniques across India.

Dr. Arun Gopal Iyer is an accomplished respiratory and critical care specialist with 22 years of professional experience. He earned his MBBS from GMC Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, followed by MD in Pulmonology from Sri Venkateswara University. He completed a DM in Respiratory Critical Care from AIIMS Delhi and holds certifications in Advanced Life Support (ALS) and Intensive Care Medicine. Dr. Iyer specializes in acute respiratory distress syndrome (ARDS), ventilator management, and complex respiratory infections including tuberculosis and non-tuberculous mycobacteria. He has authored several clinical guidelines and case reports published in peer-reviewed journals. His expertise in managing critically ill respiratory patients has made him a valuable asset in the ICU setting.

Dr. Neha Sampath Gupta is a pulmonology specialist with strong expertise in pulmonary function testing and occupational lung diseases, boasting 14 years of clinical experience. She completed her MBBS from JIPMER Puducherry and obtained her MD in Pulmonology from KEM Mumbai. Dr. Gupta pursued advanced training in occupational health and environmental pulmonology from international institutions. She is proficient in advanced spirometry, lung volume measurements, and diffusion studies, serving as the department's chief pulmonary function testing expert. Her research interests include silicosis, asbestosis, and work-related respiratory conditions affecting industrial workers. Dr. Gupta actively contributes to occupational health programs and has developed comprehensive employee wellness initiatives for corporate sectors in Hyderabad.

Dr. Vikram Anand Reddy is an eminent pulmonologist specializing in asthma and allergic airway diseases with 26 years of extensive clinical practice. He obtained his MBBS from Osmania Medical College and completed his MD in Pulmonology from NIMS Hyderabad, followed by a prestigious fellowship in Allergology and Clinical Immunology from CMC Vellore. He holds multiple certifications including FACAI (Fellow of the American College of Allergy, Asthma and Immunology). Dr. Reddy is an expert in managing severe asthma, pulmonary eosinophilia, and allergic bronchopulmonary aspergillosis (ABPA). He has established a comprehensive asthma clinic at Apollo Hospitals and has trained numerous residents in asthma management protocols. His contributions to patient education and community awareness programs have significantly improved asthma control in the Hyderabad region.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished neurologist with 28 years of clinical experience at Apollo Hospitals Jubilee Hills. He holds an MD in General Medicine from AIIMS Delhi and a DM in Neurology from NIMS Hyderabad. His specialization encompasses stroke management and cerebrovascular diseases, with particular expertise in acute stroke intervention and thrombectomy procedures. Dr. Sharma has completed advanced fellowships in Interventional Neurology from reputed international centers and holds certifications in neurosonology and stroke protocols. He has published over 45 research papers in national and international journals and is recognized for his pioneering work in reducing stroke mortality in Telangana. He is also an active member of the Indian Academy of Neurology and regularly conducts CME programs for junior physicians.

Dr. Priya Menon brings 15 years of specialized expertise in Epilepsy and EEG management. She graduated with an MD in General Medicine from CMC Vellore and subsequently obtained her DM in Neurology from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad. Her clinical interests include drug-resistant epilepsy, neuromodulation therapies, and pediatric epilepsy management. Dr. Menon holds advanced certifications in Video-EEG telemetry and has completed a fellowship in Epilepsy Surgery at Apollo Hospitals. She is proficient in managing complex seizure disorders and has successfully guided over 500 patients toward seizure freedom. Her research on antiepileptic drug interactions has been presented at multiple national conferences, contributing significantly to evidence-based epilepsy management protocols.

With 22 years of experience, Dr. Vikram Singh Rathod is an eminent neurologist specializing in Movement Disorders including Parkinson's disease, essential tremor, and dystonia. He completed his MD in General Medicine from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, and his DM in Neurology from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Rathod is certified in Deep Brain Stimulation (DBS) surgery coordination and has undergone specialized training in movement disorders at leading international institutes. He has mentored numerous neurologists and published extensively on DBS outcomes and motor complications management. His expertise extends to Botulinum toxin therapy and rehabilitation protocols for movement disorder patients. Dr. Rathod's multidisciplinary approach has earned him recognition as one of Hyderabad's leading movement disorder specialists.

Dr. Amrita Desai is a highly accomplished neuro-intensivist and critical care neurologist with 18 years of clinical practice. She holds an MD in General Medicine from JIPMER Puducherry and a DM in Neurology from KEM Mumbai, with an additional MCh in Critical Care Medicine. Her expertise includes management of status epilepticus, intracranial hypertension, and acute neurological emergencies in the ICU setting. Dr. Desai has completed advanced training in neurological resuscitation and neuromonitoring techniques. She has established robust protocols for sepsis-associated encephalopathy management and has trained ICU staff extensively. Her publications in critical care neurology journals are widely cited, and she regularly collaborates with intensivists for optimal neuro-critical care delivery.

Dr. Suresh Chandrasekhar is a renowned neurodegenerative disease specialist with 25 years of experience in managing Alzheimer's disease, Parkinson's disease, and ALS. He obtained his MD in General Medicine from Osmania Medical College and completed his DM in Neurology from AIIMS Delhi with advanced fellowship training in cognitive neurology from international institutions. Dr. Chandrasekhar has established a dedicated cognitive disorders clinic at Apollo Hospitals and has pioneered early diagnosis protocols using biomarkers and advanced imaging. His research on neuroinflammation in neurodegenerative diseases has resulted in 60+ publications in peer-reviewed journals. He is actively involved in clinical trials for emerging therapies and serves as an advisor for multiple pharmaceutical companies in drug development.

Dr. Neha Kapoor is a specialist in Neuro-rehabilitation and Stroke Recovery with 12 years of dedicated experience. She graduated with an MD in General Medicine from CMC Vellore and obtained her DM in Neurology from NIMS Hyderabad, supplemented by specialized training in neuro-physiotherapy and motor recovery. Dr. Kapoor has developed comprehensive rehabilitation protocols for post-stroke patients and has successfully managed over 1,000 cases with remarkable functional recovery outcomes. She holds certifications in constraint-induced movement therapy and mirror therapy techniques. Her interdisciplinary approach involving physiotherapists, occupational therapists, and speech therapists has set new standards in stroke rehabilitation at Apollo Hospitals, significantly improving patient quality of life and reducing disability.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Emergency Medicine specialist with 28 years of experience in trauma and critical care management. He completed his MD in Emergency Medicine from AIIMS Delhi and holds a DM in Trauma and Critical Care from CMC Vellore. Dr. Sharma has successfully managed over 50,000 emergency cases, with special expertise in polytrauma resuscitation and emergency interventional procedures. He is a certified instructor in Advanced Trauma Life Support (ATLS) and has published 15 peer-reviewed research papers on emergency protocols. His clinical focus includes pre-hospital emergency care coordination and disaster management. Dr. Sharma was awarded the "Exemplary Emergency Physician" award by the Indian Medical Association in 2019 and has trained more than 200 junior physicians in emergency protocols.

Dr. Priya Venkatesh brings 16 years of specialized expertise in pediatric emergency medicine and toxicology. She graduated from NIMS Hyderabad and completed her MD in Emergency Medicine from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, followed by a fellowship in Pediatric Emergency Care from JIPMER, Puducherry. Dr. Venkatesh is an expert in pediatric resuscitation, poisoning management, and acute care for children with rare conditions. She holds certifications in Pediatric Advanced Life Support (PALS) and is a member of the European Society of Emergency Medicine. With her research on pediatric poisoning cases, she has contributed significantly to emergency toxicology protocols in India. Her compassionate approach and extensive experience make her a preferred pediatric emergency specialist.

Dr. Vikram Singh Rathod is a highly skilled interventional emergency physician with 22 years of clinical experience. He completed his MS from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad, and pursued an advanced fellowship in Emergency Ultrasound and Interventional Procedures from King George's Medical College, Lucknow. Dr. Rathod specializes in emergency ultrasound, emergency airway management, and bedside resuscitation procedures. He has pioneered the use of point-of-care ultrasound (POCUS) in Apollo Hospitals' emergency department and has trained over 150 physicians in this technique. With expertise in managing acute respiratory distress and cardiovascular emergencies, Dr. Rathod has been instrumental in reducing emergency department mortality rates by 18% over the past five years.

Dr. Anjali Deshmukh is a prominent cardio-pulmonary emergency specialist with 19 years of dedicated service in emergency care. She earned her MD from KEM Mumbai and completed a DM in Cardiac Emergency Medicine from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Deshmukh is an expert in acute coronary syndrome management, arrhythmia recognition, and emergency cardiac interventions. She holds certifications in Advanced Cardiac Life Support (ACLS), Acute Coronary Syndrome management, and Emergency Echocardiography. Dr. Deshmukh has led several quality improvement initiatives that reduced door-to-balloon time for STEMI patients to under 60 minutes. Her research on risk stratification in chest pain patients has been published in multiple national and international journals, earning her recognition as one of India's leading cardio-emergency physicians.

Dr. Arun Narayan Pillai is an accomplished emergency neurologist with 24 years of experience in acute stroke and neuro-critical care. He completed his MD in Emergency Medicine from CMC Vellore and subsequently obtained a DM in Emergency Neurology from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Pillai is an expert in acute stroke management, thrombolytic protocols, and emergency management of seizures and intracranial hemorrhages. He is certified in Advanced Stroke Life Support and has established Apollo Hospitals' comprehensive stroke center protocol. Dr. Pillai has successfully managed over 3,000 acute stroke cases with impressive thrombolytic outcomes. His contributions to emergency neurology include training programs for rapid neurological assessment and his pioneering work in telemedicine consultation for stroke patients in rural areas.

Dr. Meera Iyer is an exceptional disaster management and infectious disease emergency specialist with 18 years of field and clinical experience. She graduated from Osmania Medical College and completed her MD from NIMS Hyderabad with a subsequent fellowship in Disaster Medicine from JIPMER. Dr. Iyer brings unique expertise in managing epidemic and pandemic emergencies, infectious disease outbreaks, and disaster triage protocols. She has served in multiple disaster relief operations and COVID-19 emergency response teams, earning commendation from the Ministry of Health. Dr. Iyer is certified in Disaster Medicine and is an active member of the Disaster Management Committee of the Indian Medical Association. Her interdisciplinary approach and field experience make her invaluable in managing complex emergency situations and public health crises at Apollo Hospitals.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Mehta is a highly experienced interventional cardiologist with 24 years of clinical expertise in coronary interventions and structural heart disease management. He completed his MD in Medicine from AIIMS Delhi, followed by a DM in Cardiology from CMC Vellore. Dr. Mehta pursued advanced fellowships in interventional cardiology from leading centers in Europe and has performed over 5,000 percutaneous coronary interventions with excellent outcomes. His specialization includes complex coronary lesions, chronic total occlusions, and left main interventions. He holds certifications in advanced cardiac life support and interventional cardiology from the European Society of Cardiology. At Yashoda Hospitals, Dr. Mehta leads the interventional cardiology program and is recognized for his innovative approaches in treating acute coronary syndromes. He has published numerous research papers in national and international cardiology journals.

Dr. Priya Sharma is a distinguished cardiac electrophysiologist with 18 years of specialized experience in arrhythmia management and device therapy. She obtained her MD in Medicine from NIMS Hyderabad and completed her DM in Cardiology from Gandhi Medical College, followed by a specialized fellowship in electrophysiology from JIPMER Puducherry. Dr. Sharma possesses expertise in radiofrequency ablation, cryoablation for complex arrhythmias, and implantable cardioverter-defibrillator (ICD) management. She has successfully performed over 3,000 electrophysiological procedures and holds certifications in advanced arrhythmia management. Her academic contributions include multiple publications on atrial fibrillation management and sudden cardiac death prevention. Dr. Sharma is an active member of the Heart Rhythm Society and regularly presents her research at international forums, contributing significantly to the advancement of cardiac electrophysiology in India.

Dr. Vikram Singh Rao is an accomplished preventive cardiologist and heart failure specialist with 22 years of clinical experience. He completed his MD in Medicine from Osmania Medical College and his DM in Cardiology from KEM Mumbai, with an additional certification in heart failure management from the American College of Cardiology. Dr. Rao specializes in advanced heart failure therapeutics, cardiac rehabilitation, and cardiovascular risk modification. He has extensive experience with mechanical circulatory support devices and is proficient in echocardiography and cardiac imaging. With over 10,000 patients managed for heart failure across various ejection fractions, Dr. Rao has established comprehensive cardiac rehabilitation programs. He is an accomplished researcher with 40+ publications in peer-reviewed journals and actively contributes to continuing medical education through workshops and seminars on preventive cardiology and lifestyle modifications.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished consultant in Trauma and Critical Care at Yashoda Hospitals' Emergency Care Department with 24 years of extensive experience. Dr. Vikram Singh Chouhan is an accomplished endourologist and stone disease specialist with 16 years of dedicated experience in the Urology department.
