Dr. Meera Vasant Iyer is an accomplished Neurologist with 16 years of clinical expertise in Dementia and Cognitive Neurology. She earned her MBBS from CMC Vellore and completed her MD in Neurology from NIMS Hyderabad. She obtained a DM in Cognitive Neurology and Neuropsychiatry from AIIMS Delhi and completed specialized training in Memory Disorders and Neuropsychological Assessment. Dr. Iyer is skilled in early detection of Alzheimer's disease and various dementia subtypes using advanced neuroimaging and biomarker analysis. She has published 25 research articles on cognitive decline and neurodegenerative diseases and actively collaborates with international dementia research networks, contributing significantly to understanding age-related cognitive disorders in the Indian population.

Dr. Vikram Reddy Naidu is an expert Neurologist with 22 years of experience focusing on Neuromuscular Disorders and Neuroimmunology. He completed his MBBS from JIPMER, Puducherry, and obtained his MD in Neurology from AIIMS Delhi. He pursued a specialized DM in Neuroimmunology from NIMS Hyderabad and completed international fellowships in Myasthenia Gravis and Guillain-Barré Syndrome management at premier European centers. Dr. Naidu possesses advanced skills in nerve conduction studies, electromyography, and muscle biopsy interpretation. He has established Continental Hospitals' dedicated neuromuscular clinic and authored 28 publications on rare neuromuscular disorders. His notable achievements include organizing multiple continuing medical education programs on neuromuscular diseases for neurologists across Telangana and Andhra Pradesh.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a highly experienced Gastroenterologist and Endoscopist with 28 years of clinical practice at AIG Hospitals, specializing in therapeutic and diagnostic upper GI endoscopy. He completed his MBBS from AIIMS Delhi and obtained his MD in Internal Medicine from the same institution, followed by specialized DM in Gastroenterology from CMC Vellore. Dr. Sharma holds international certifications in advanced endoscopic techniques from the American College of Gastroenterology. He has successfully performed over 15,000 endoscopic procedures and is renowned for his expertise in managing complex cases of esophageal varices, peptic ulcer disease, and gastric malignancies. His research work on early diagnosis of gastric cancers has been published in multiple national and international journals. Dr. Sharma mentors junior consultants and is an active member of the Indian Society of Gastroenterology.

Dr. Ananya Deshmukh is a distinguished Colonoscopy specialist with 16 years of dedicated experience in lower GI endoscopic procedures. She earned her MBBS from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad, and completed her MS in General Surgery from Gandhi Medical College. Subsequently, she pursued her DM in Gastroenterology from NIMS Hyderabad, where she developed an interest in advanced colonoscopy techniques. Dr. Deshmukh is certified in ERCP (Endoscopic Retrograde Cholangiopancreatography) and has completed fellowship training in endoscopic ultrasound (EUS) from reputed centers. With expertise in polypectomy, therapeutic interventions, and early colorectal cancer detection, she has contributed significantly to cancer screening programs in Hyderabad. Dr. Deshmukh is a published researcher with numerous publications on colorectal pathology and preventive gastroenterology.

Dr. Vikram Singh Patel is an accomplished ERCP specialist and Biliopancreatic Endoscopist with 22 years of clinical expertise in complex pancreaticobiliary disorders. He graduated from JIPMER Puducherry and completed his MD in Internal Medicine followed by specialized DM training in Gastroenterology from KEM Hospital, Mumbai. Dr. Patel underwent fellowship training in advanced ERCP techniques at premier European centers and holds multiple international certifications. He has successfully managed over 8,000 complex ERCP cases involving choledocholithiasis, biliary strictures, and pancreatic disorders. His expertise includes sphincterotomy, stent placement, and management of post-surgical complications. Dr. Patel regularly conducts hands-on workshops on ERCP techniques and is an invited speaker at national and international gastroenterology conferences.

Dr. Shruti Gupta is an innovative Endoscopic Ultrasound (EUS) specialist and Therapeutic Endoscopist with 14 years of progressive experience in advanced endoscopic interventions. She obtained her MBBS from AIIMS Delhi and completed her MD in Internal Medicine followed by DM in Gastroenterology from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Gupta pursued specialized fellowship training in Endoscopic Ultrasound and interventional endoscopy at internationally recognized centers, achieving expertise in tissue acquisition, guided interventions, and cyst management. With over 4,500 EUS procedures to her credit, she has pioneered several minimally invasive techniques for pancreatic and GI malignancies at AIG Hospitals. Her particular interest lies in EUS-guided fine-needle aspiration and therapeutic drainage procedures. Dr. Gupta is an accomplished researcher with publications in high-impact gastroenterology journals.

Dr. Arun Narayanan is a senior Gastroenterologic Endoscopist with 25 years of distinguished service, specializing in both diagnostic and therapeutic endoscopy with particular expertise in esophageal disorders and motility evaluation. He graduated from Madras Medical College and completed his MD in Internal Medicine from the University of Madras, followed by DM in Gastroenterology from CMC Vellore. Dr. Narayanan is an accomplished esophageal manometry and pH-metry specialist with advanced training in achalasia management and Barrett's esophagus surveillance. He has published extensively on esophageal pathology and has trained numerous fellows in endoscopic techniques. With proficiency in advanced therapeutic procedures and a patient-centric approach, Dr. Narayanan has managed thousands of complex cases spanning across the spectrum of gastrointestinal endoscopy, establishing himself as a trusted expert in the field.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Reddy is a Senior Consultant Orthopedic Surgeon specializing in Joint Replacement Surgery at Continental Hospitals, Hyderabad. With 22 years of clinical experience, Dr. Reddy completed his MS Orthopedics from NIMS Hyderabad followed by a prestigious fellowship in Hip and Knee Replacement from the Royal Orthopaedic Hospital, London. He holds certification in Minimally Invasive Joint Surgery and has performed over 3,500 successful joint replacement procedures. Dr. Reddy is particularly renowned for his expertise in robotic-assisted knee arthroplasty and has been invited as a guest lecturer at multiple national conferences. His patient satisfaction rate consistently exceeds 98%, and he has published 15 research papers in indexed journals on joint preservation techniques and outcomes.

Dr. Priya Sharma is a Consultant Spine Surgeon with 18 years of specialized experience in complex spine pathologies at Continental Hospitals. She completed her MD from AIIMS Delhi and subsequently pursued MCh Spine Surgery from CMC Vellore, one of India's premier institutions. Dr. Sharma has undergone advanced training in Minimally Invasive Spine Surgery at the National University Hospital, Singapore. She specializes in degenerative disc disease, scoliosis correction, and trauma spine management. With over 2,000 spine surgeries to her credit, Dr. Sharma has particular expertise in endoscopic discectomy and has pioneered several spine surgery techniques in the region. She is an active member of the Indian Spine Society and regularly contributes to medical literature.

Dr. Arun Verma is a highly skilled Sports Medicine and Arthroscopy Specialist with 16 years of dedicated practice in orthopedic sports injuries. He completed his MS Orthopedics from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, followed by a specialized fellowship in Sports Medicine and Arthroscopic Surgery from the Medanta Institute, Delhi. Dr. Verma is an accredited member of the Indian Orthopaedic Association and specializes in ACL reconstruction, meniscal repairs, and shoulder arthroscopy. He has been the official orthopedic consultant for several state-level cricket and badminton teams. With expertise in both surgical and conservative management of sports injuries, Dr. Verma has treated numerous professional athletes and maintains a remarkable return-to-sport success rate of 95%.

Dr. Anitha Krishnan is a Consultant Pediatric Orthopedic Surgeon with 19 years of experience in managing congenital and developmental orthopedic disorders in children. She obtained her MS Orthopedics from JIPMER, Puducherry and subsequently completed a specialized DM in Pediatric Orthopedics from KEM Mumbai. Dr. Krishnan has undergone advanced training in pediatric deformity correction and limb lengthening at the University of Illinois, USA. She specializes in correcting clubfoot, cerebral palsy-related deformities, and congenital hip dysplasia using both traditional and modern techniques including external fixation and osteotomies. With over 2,500 pediatric cases managed successfully, Dr. Krishnan is recognized as a leading pediatric orthopedic expert in South India and has mentored numerous residents in this specialized field.

Dr. Vikram Singh Rao is a Senior Consultant in Orthopedic Trauma Surgery with 25 years of extensive experience in managing complex fractures and polytrauma cases at Continental Hospitals. He completed his MS Orthopedics from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad and obtained advanced certification in Trauma Surgery from the AO Trauma Institute, Switzerland. Dr. Rao specializes in complex pilon fractures, pelvic trauma, and polytrauma management. He has successfully managed over 4,000 trauma cases with an excellent functional outcome rate. His expertise includes internal fixation, external fixation, and damage control orthopedics. Dr. Rao is an AO Alliance faculty member and regularly conducts training workshops for resident doctors on modern trauma management techniques.

Dr. Neha Malhotra is a Consultant Orthopedic Surgeon specializing in Hand and Microsurgery with 14 years of clinical practice. She completed her MS Orthopedics from AIIMS Delhi followed by a specialized fellowship in Hand and Microsurgery from the prestigious Bangalore Hand Surgery Institute. Dr. Malhotra holds multiple certifications in peripheral nerve reconstruction and tendon surgery. She specializes in complex hand trauma, peripheral nerve injuries, and reconstructive procedures with exceptional microsurgical skills. Having performed over 1,800 hand surgeries with minimal complications, Dr. Malhotra is known for her meticulous approach and exceptional functional outcomes. She regularly presents her cases at national and international conferences and has contributed to several publications on hand surgery innovations.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished gastroenterological surgeon with over 22 years of clinical experience in advanced laparoscopic and robotic GI surgery. He completed his MBBS and MS from AIIMS Delhi, followed by MCh in GI Surgery from CMC Vellore, one of India's premier institutions. Dr. Sharma specializes in complex colorectal cancers, inflammatory bowel disease surgeries, and minimally invasive approaches to esophageal disorders. He has undergone advanced fellowship training at the European Surgical Institute and is certified in advanced laparoscopic techniques by the International Association of Surgeons, Gastroenterologists and Oncologists. With over 3,000 successful surgical procedures, Dr. Sharma is recognized for his expertise in emergency GI surgeries and has published extensively in national and international journals. His patient-centered approach and innovative surgical techniques have made him a sought-after consultant across India.

Dr. Priya Menon is a compassionate and highly skilled hepato-pancreatic-biliary surgeon with 16 years of specialized experience. She earned her MBBS from JIPMER Puducherry and MS in General Surgery from NIMS Hyderabad, followed by a prestigious DM in HPB Surgery from Osmania Medical College. Dr. Menon has completed advanced fellowships in hepatic resection and pancreatic surgery at premier centers in Singapore and the UK. She specializes in complex liver resections, pancreatic cancer management, biliary tract diseases, and living donor liver transplant surgery. Board-certified in hepato-pancreatic surgery, Dr. Menon has pioneered several minimally invasive techniques at AIG Hospitals. Her research focuses on improving outcomes in advanced pancreatic malignancies, with numerous publications in high-impact journals. She is deeply committed to mentoring junior surgeons and advancing the field of HPB surgery in India.

Dr. Anil Gupta brings 19 years of excellence in gastrointestinal oncological surgery and bariatric surgery. A graduate of Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, he completed his MS from the same institution and subsequently obtained his MCh in Surgical Oncology from KEM Mumbai. Dr. Gupta is internationally certified in bariatric and metabolic surgery and has completed specialized training at the American College of Surgeons. His expertise encompasses advanced gastric cancer surgery, esophageal malignancies, obesity management through multiple bariatric procedures, and reconstruction techniques. Dr. Gupta has successfully performed over 2,500 major GI surgeries with exceptional outcomes and zero mortality in elective procedures. He is an active member of the Indian Association of Surgical Oncology and regularly contributes to surgical conferences. His dedication to quality care and continuous learning has established him as a leader in gastrointestinal surgical oncology.

Dr. Divya Prakash is an accomplished surgeon specializing in motility disorders and esophageal diseases with 12 years of focused experience in GI surgery. She completed her MBBS and MS from KEM Mumbai and further specialized with a DM in Minimally Invasive GI Surgery from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Prakash has undergone advanced fellowship training in esophageal surgery at the Mayo Clinic, USA, and is certified in advanced diagnostic laparoscopy and therapeutic endoscopy. Her areas of expertise include hiatal hernia repair, achalasia management, Barrett's esophagus, and complex esophageal reconstructions using cutting-edge minimally invasive techniques. Dr. Prakash is recognized for her innovative approach to difficult cases and has published research on outcomes of endoscopic and surgical management of esophageal disorders. She actively participates in international surgical societies and remains committed to providing evidence-based, compassionate care to her patients.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Medical Oncologist with 24 years of clinical experience in treating solid tumors and hematological malignancies. He completed his MBBS from AIIMS Delhi and pursued his MD in Internal Medicine from the same institution, followed by a DM in Medical Oncology from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Sharma holds certification in Clinical Oncology from the Royal College of Physicians, London, and has completed advanced fellowships in Gastrointestinal Oncology at Tata Memorial Hospital, Mumbai. His expertise encompasses chemotherapy, targeted therapy, and immunotherapy protocols. He has published over 45 research papers in national and international journals and has pioneered several innovative treatment approaches for colorectal and gastric cancers at Continental Hospitals. Dr. Sharma is actively involved in patient advocacy and has trained numerous junior oncologists.

Dr. Priya Desai is a highly accomplished Surgical Oncologist with 18 years of specialized surgical experience. She earned her MBBS from CMC Vellore and completed her MS in General Surgery from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad. Subsequently, she obtained her MCh in Surgical Oncology from JIPMER Puducherry, specializing in breast and thoracic cancers. Dr. Desai has completed fellowships in Breast Reconstruction Surgery and Minimally Invasive Oncological Surgery at international institutions. She is an expert in oncoplastic surgery and has performed over 2,000 successful surgical procedures. Her notable achievements include developing patient-centered surgical protocols and establishing a dedicated breast cancer support group. Dr. Desai is a recipient of the Young Oncologist Award and actively contributes to medical education.

Dr. Arun Venkatesh is an exemplary Radiation Oncologist with 21 years of dedicated service in cancer radiotherapy. He completed his MBBS from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad, and pursued his MD in Radiotherapy from the same institution. He holds a DM in Medical Oncology and has specialized training in Advanced Radiation Techniques including IMRT, IGRT, and Brachytherapy from international centers. Dr. Venkatesh has expertise in treating head and neck, lung, and gynecological malignancies using cutting-edge radiation protocols. He has authored 38 peer-reviewed publications and regularly presents at national and international oncology conferences. His commitment to patient care and research has resulted in improved survival outcomes. Dr. Venkatesh actively mentors young radiation oncologists and advocates for affordable cancer treatment accessibility.

Dr. Neha Gupta is a passionate Pediatric Oncologist with 16 years of experience in childhood cancer management. She completed her MBBS from KIMS, Secunderabad, followed by her MD in Pediatrics from NIMS Hyderabad. She obtained her DM in Pediatric Oncology from AIIMS Delhi and has completed specialized fellowships in Leukemia and Lymphoma management at Kidwai Memorial Institute of Oncology, Bangalore. Dr. Gupta specializes in treating acute leukemias, lymphomas, and solid tumors in children with a focus on minimizing treatment toxicity. She has developed comprehensive psychosocial support programs for pediatric patients and their families. With over 800 pediatric cancer cases managed, she has achieved survival rates exceeding national standards. Dr. Gupta is recognized for her compassionate approach and has received multiple awards for excellence in pediatric oncology.

Dr. Vikram Singh Chauhan is a renowned Head and Neck Surgical Oncologist with 26 years of extensive clinical experience. He obtained his MBBS from KEM Mumbai and completed his MS in ENT from the same institution. His MCh in Surgical Oncology was earned from AIIMS Delhi with specialized training in head and neck malignancies. Dr. Chauhan holds certifications from international surgical societies and has completed fellowships in Microvascular Reconstruction and Endoscopic Head and Neck Surgery. He is an expert in managing complex laryngeal, pharyngeal, and thyroid cancers with organ preservation techniques. Dr. Chauhan has published over 60 research papers and has been invited speaker at numerous international conferences. His innovative surgical approaches have set new standards in head and neck cancer treatment. He is deeply committed to training the next generation of surgical oncologists.

Dr. Anjali Patel is an accomplished Clinical Oncologist and Medical Geneticist with 19 years of specialized expertise in hereditary cancer syndromes and personalized oncology. She completed her MBBS from Baroda Medical College and pursued her MD in Internal Medicine from GIMS Ahmedabad. She obtained her DM in Medical Oncology from NIMS Hyderabad and specialized in Cancer Genetics and Genomic Medicine through fellowship at AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Patel is proficient in interpreting genetic testing, counseling high-risk families, and developing personalized treatment plans based on genomic profiling. She has collaborated on groundbreaking research projects identifying novel mutations in Indian cancer populations. With over 2,500 cancer patients managed through personalized approaches, her work has significantly improved treatment outcomes. Dr. Patel is a passionate advocate for precision medicine and regularly conducts awareness programs on hereditary cancer risks.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished hepatologist with 24 years of clinical expertise in liver transplantation and cirrhosis management. He completed his MD in Internal Medicine from AIIMS Delhi, followed by a DM in Gastroenterology from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Sharma holds specialized fellowships in Hepatology from King George's Medical University, Lucknow, and has pursued advanced training in liver transplant immunology at CMC Vellore. His research on post-transplant complications has been published in multiple international journals. With expertise in managing complex hepatic encephalopathy cases and living donor liver transplantation, Dr. Sharma has performed over 500 successful transplant evaluations at AIG Hospitals. He is a member of the Indian Association for the Study of the Liver and actively contributes to advancing hepatology education across India.

Dr. Priya Mahajan is a renowned expert in viral hepatitis management with 16 years of specialized experience. She earned her MD in Internal Medicine from JIPMER Puducherry, followed by a DM in Gastroenterology and Hepatology from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad. Dr. Mahajan completed a prestigious fellowship in Viral Hepatitis at Gandhi Medical College and has certifications in Hepatitis C DAA therapy and HBV management. She has successfully managed over 2000 patients with hepatitis B and C, achieving cure rates exceeding 95% in HCV cases. Her publications on treatment outcomes in resource-limited settings have been recognized internationally. Dr. Mahajan is particularly skilled in managing treatment-naïve and treatment-experienced patients, and she actively mentors junior physicians in modern antiviral strategies.

Dr. Amit Patel is an accomplished hepatologist specializing in fatty liver disease and metabolic liver disorders with 18 years of clinical practice. He obtained his MD from KEM Mumbai and pursued advanced training with a DM in Gastroenterology from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Patel completed a specialized fellowship in Non-Alcoholic Fatty Liver Disease (NAFLD) at CMC Vellore and holds additional certifications in liver fibrinogenesis. With expertise in managing NAFLD, NASH, and metabolic-associated fatty liver disease, he has established a dedicated clinic for non-alcoholic liver disease management. He has authored several chapters on NAFLD management and delivered lectures at national conferences. His research initiatives focus on early detection and prevention strategies, significantly impacting patient outcomes and quality of life improvements at AIG Hospitals.

Dr. Sunita Desai is a prominent hepatologist with 20 years of expertise in autoimmune liver diseases and primary biliary cholangitis (PBC) management. She completed her MD in Internal Medicine from Osmania Medical College and obtained her DM in Gastroenterology from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Desai holds specialized training in autoimmune hepatitis from CMC Vellore and completed a fellowship in Cholestatic Liver Diseases. She is certified in advanced endoscopic retrograde cholangiopancreatography (ERCP) procedures. With a case series exceeding 1500 patients with autoimmune liver conditions, Dr. Desai has contributed significantly to understanding disease pathogenesis in Indian populations. Her work on early immunosuppressive therapy protocols has improved disease remission rates. She actively participates in clinical trials on PBC therapeutics and mentors research scholars in hepatoimmunology.

Dr. Vikram Singh Rao is an expert in hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) diagnosis and management with 22 years of specialized experience. He earned his MD and MS from AIIMS Delhi and obtained his DM in Gastroenterology from Gandhi Medical College, Mumbai. Dr. Rao completed advanced training in HCC imaging and interventional procedures at King George's Medical University. He is certified in transarterial chemoembolization (TACE), radiofrequency ablation, and hepatic artery infusion therapy. With expertise in managing early and advanced HCC cases, he has successfully coordinated multidisciplinary tumor boards at AIG Hospitals. His publications on treatment outcomes in HCC and predictive markers for patient survival have been cited extensively. Dr. Rao is an accomplished endosonographer and actively contributes to HCC screening programs across Hyderabad.

Dr. Neha Gupta is a skilled hepatologist with 12 years of experience focusing on pediatric liver disease and rare genetic hepatic conditions. She completed her MD from JIPMER Puducherry and pursued her DM in Gastroenterology from NIMS Hyderabad, followed by a specialized fellowship in Pediatric Hepatology at CMC Vellore. Dr. Gupta holds certifications in Wilson's disease management and inherited metabolic liver disorders. With expertise in managing Wilson's disease, hemochromatosis, progressive familial intrahepatic cholestasis, and other rare conditions, she has established a comprehensive rare liver disease clinic. She has coordinated genetic counseling programs for families with inherited liver diseases and published research on long-term outcomes of pediatric liver transplantation. Dr. Gupta is known for her compassionate patient care and has received recognition for her contributions to improving outcomes in pediatric hepatology at AIG Hospitals.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Verma is a highly accomplished Consultant Radiologist with 22 years of experience in diagnostic and interventional radiology. He completed his MD Radiology from AIIMS Delhi, followed by a prestigious DM fellowship in Interventional Radiology from CMC Vellore. Dr. Verma specializes in minimally invasive interventional procedures including vascular interventions, percutaneous biopsies, and image-guided ablations. He is an expert in CT and MRI imaging with particular expertise in neuroradiology and thoracic imaging. Board-certified by the Indian Board of Radiology, he has authored over 35 research papers in national and international journals. His contributions to advancing interventional radiology techniques in India have earned him recognition as a pioneer in the field. Dr. Verma regularly conducts workshops and training programs for junior radiologists.

Dr. Priya Shankaranarayanan is a distinguished Consultant Radiologist specializing in musculoskeletal radiology and ultrasound imaging with 18 years of clinical experience. She obtained her MD Radiology from NIMS Hyderabad and completed her fellowship in MSK Radiology from KEM Mumbai. Dr. Shankaranarayanan is an expert in ultrasound-guided interventions, joint injections, and sports imaging, serving as the preferred radiologist for several sports teams in Hyderabad. She holds certifications in advanced ultrasound and echocardiography from international bodies. Published extensively in peer-reviewed journals, she has presented her research at numerous national and international conferences. Dr. Shankaranarayanan is passionate about mentoring young radiologists and has been instrumental in establishing ultrasound training programs at AIG Hospitals, making her an invaluable asset to the department.

Dr. Anil Kumar Tripathi is a senior Consultant Radiologist with 28 years of extensive experience in general and neuroradiology. He earned his MD Radiology from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad, and completed his DM in Neuroradiology from JIPMER Puducherry. Dr. Tripathi possesses exceptional expertise in brain and spine imaging, particularly in stroke management, neoplastic lesions, and degenerative spine disorders. With advanced certifications in 3D imaging and MR spectroscopy, he has successfully managed over 5,000 complex cases. He is a recognized speaker at national radiological conferences and has published more than 40 peer-reviewed articles. Dr. Tripathi serves as a mentor to numerous residents and has significantly contributed to establishing AIG Hospitals as a center of excellence for neuroradiological imaging in the region.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a highly experienced Emergency Medicine Consultant with 22 years of expertise in trauma and critical care management at Aster Prime Hospital. He completed his MBBS from AIIMS Delhi and pursued his MD in Emergency Medicine from CMC Vellore, followed by a specialized DM in Trauma and Critical Care from JIPMER Puducherry. Dr. Sharma holds certifications in Advanced Trauma Life Support (ATLS), Pediatric Advanced Life Support (PALS), and Pre-Hospital Emergency Care. He has established himself as a leading authority in polytrauma management and has trained over 500 emergency care professionals. His research contributions on hemorrhage control protocols have been published in national and international journals, making him a sought-after speaker at emergency medicine conferences across India.

Dr. Priya Desai Menon brings 16 years of clinical excellence in emergency toxicology and resuscitation medicine. She obtained her MBBS from Gandhi Medical College Hyderabad and completed her MD in Emergency Medicine from Osmania Medical College. Subsequently, she pursued a specialized fellowship in Medical Toxicology from the National Institute of Mental Health and Neurosciences (NIMHANS) Bangalore. Dr. Menon is recognized for her expertise in poisoning management, drug overdose cases, and environmental toxins. She holds multiple certifications including ACLS, ECLS, and Emergency Ultrasound. With a passion for community health education, she has conducted numerous awareness programs on substance abuse and toxin exposure across Telangana.

Dr. Vikram Singh Patel is a distinguished Emergency and Acute Care Physician with 28 years of clinical expertise, specializing in cardiovascular emergencies and acute coronary syndrome management. He completed his MBBS from KEM Mumbai and obtained his MS in Emergency Medicine from NIMS Hyderabad, followed by a prestigious MCh in Cardiac Surgery from AIIMS New Delhi. Dr. Patel holds advanced certifications in Acute Cardiac Care (ACCS), Advanced Cardiovascular Life Support (ACVLS), and Emergency Echocardiography. He has pioneered several rapid-response protocols for acute MI management that have significantly reduced door-to-balloon times at the hospital. His contributions include mentoring junior faculty and publishing over 25 peer-reviewed articles on cardiac emergency interventions.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Clinical Pharmacist and Head of the Pharmacy Department at AIG Hospitals, Hyderabad, with over 24 years of clinical experience. He holds an MD in Pharmacy Practice from AIIMS Delhi and an MSc in Pharmaceutical Sciences from Osmania University. Dr. Sharma is an expert in cardiology and critical care pharmacotherapy, with specialized certifications in Drug Safety and Pharmacovigilance from the European Association of Clinical Pharmacology. He has authored 18 research publications in peer-reviewed journals and has mentored more than 200 pharmacy students. His expertise includes drug-drug interactions, therapeutic drug monitoring, and evidence-based clinical pharmacy services. Dr. Sharma is actively involved in continuing medical education programs and serves as an accredited clinical pharmacy trainer for the hospital network.

Dr. Priya Deshmukh is a highly skilled Oncology Clinical Pharmacist with 18 years of specialized experience in cancer chemotherapy and targeted therapeutics. She graduated with an MSc in Pharmaceutical Sciences from CMC Vellore and completed her MD in Clinical Pharmacy from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Deshmukh holds advanced certifications in Oncology Pharmacy Practice from the American Society of Health-System Pharmacists (ASHP) and has completed a fellowship in Hematologic Malignancies. She specializes in personalized medicine, chemotherapy dose optimization, and managing adverse drug reactions in cancer patients. Her key achievements include developing institutional chemotherapy protocols and establishing a pharmacogenomics testing program at AIG. Dr. Deshmukh is a renowned speaker at national oncology conferences and actively contributes to research in precision medicine.

Dr. Vikram Patel is a prominent Clinical Pharmacologist and Medication Safety Specialist with 22 years of experience in hospital pharmacy operations and geriatric pharmacotherapy. He obtained his MSc in Pharmaceutical Chemistry from KEM Mumbai and pursued an MD in Clinical Pharmacy from JIPMER Puducherry. Dr. Patel holds certifications in Medication Error Prevention, Hospital Pharmacy Management, and Geriatric Pharmacotherapy from the International Pharmaceutical Federation. His expertise encompasses pediatric and geriatric dosing adjustments, renal/hepatic impairment management, and complex drug interactions in polypharmacy patients. He has successfully reduced medication errors by 40% through his innovative pharmacy workflow initiatives. Dr. Patel has published 12 clinical guidelines and regularly conducts pharmaceutical care rounds in the hospital's intensive care and geriatric units.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a highly experienced Senior Consultant and Head of Critical Care Medicine at AIG Hospitals' ICU department with 28 years of dedicated clinical practice. He graduated from AIIMS Delhi and obtained his MD in Internal Medicine followed by a DM in Critical Care Medicine from the National Board of Examination. Dr. Sharma specializes in sepsis management, multi-organ failure, and mechanical ventilation strategies. He has completed fellowship training in Advanced Life Support from the American Heart Association and holds certifications in ACLS, PALS, and ECMO management. With over 500 critical care cases managed annually, Dr. Sharma has authored 15+ peer-reviewed publications on ICU-acquired infections and ventilator management. His expertise in hemodynamic monitoring and extracorporeal membrane oxygenation (ECMO) has significantly improved patient outcomes at AIG Hospitals.

Dr. Priya Malhotra is a distinguished Consultant in Neuro-Critical Care with 18 years of specialized experience in managing critically ill neurological and neurosurgical patients. She completed her MBBS from NIMS Hyderabad and pursued her MD in Neurology from CMC Vellore, followed by a DM in Neuro-Critical Care from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Malhotra specializes in stroke management, traumatic brain injury, subarachnoid hemorrhage, and status epilepticus. She is certified in Neuro-Ultrasound and has completed advanced training in Neuro-Monitoring and ICP management from reputed international centers. With expertise in multimodal neuromonitoring and advanced neuroimaging interpretation, she has been instrumental in establishing the Neuro-ICU protocols at AIG Hospitals. Dr. Malhotra has presented her research at multiple national and international neurocritical care conferences.

Dr. Vikram Singh Patel is a renowned Consultant Intensivist specializing in Cardio-Pulmonary Critical Care with 22 years of comprehensive clinical experience. He obtained his MBBS from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, and completed his MD in Medicine from JIPMER, Pondicherry. Dr. Patel holds an MCh in Cardiothoracic Surgery from KEM Mumbai and advanced certifications in Echocardiography and Hemodynamic Monitoring. His sub-specialization includes acute heart failure management, acute coronary syndromes, arrhythmia management, and respiratory failure. He is proficient in transesophageal echocardiography (TEE) and central venous catheterization. Dr. Patel has conducted multiple clinical trials on acute decompensated heart failure and published extensively in national medical journals. His innovative approach to cardiopulmonary resuscitation protocols has significantly enhanced survival rates.

Dr. Anjali Deshmukh is a talented Consultant with specialized expertise in Pediatric and Neonatal Critical Care, bringing 16 years of dedicated experience in managing critically ill children and newborns. She graduated from Osmania Medical College and obtained her MD in Pediatrics from AIIMS Delhi, followed by a DM in Pediatric Critical Care from CMC Vellore. Dr. Deshmukh is certified in Pediatric Advanced Life Support (PALS), Neonatal Resuscitation Program (NRP), and Pediatric Trauma Life Support. Her specialization includes sepsis in neonates, respiratory distress syndrome, acute kidney injury in children, and multi-organ failure management in pediatric patients. She has expertise in non-invasive ventilation techniques and advanced hemodynamic support in children. Dr. Deshmukh has authored several case reports and clinical guidelines for pediatric ICU management and actively participates in training programs for junior medical staff.

Dr. Arjun Reddy Naidu is an accomplished Consultant Intensivist with exceptional expertise in Surgical and Trauma Critical Care, accumulating 25 years of rigorous clinical practice. He completed his MBBS and MS in General Surgery from NIMS Hyderabad and obtained his DM in Critical Care Medicine from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Naidu specializes in post-operative management of complex surgical cases, trauma resuscitation, abdominal compartment syndrome, and acute surgical emergencies. He holds advanced certifications in Trauma Life Support (ATLS), Advanced Trauma Life Support, and Surgical Critical Care. With experience managing over 3000 critically ill surgical and trauma patients, Dr. Naidu has developed innovative protocols for damage control resuscitation and post-traumatic complications management. His research work on sepsis following abdominal trauma has been published in prestigious surgical journals, and he mentors junior intensivists in advanced surgical critical care principles.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a highly experienced Consultant Nephrologist at Aster Prime Hospital with over 22 years of clinical expertise in managing complex kidney diseases. He completed his MBBS from AIIMS Delhi, followed by MD in General Medicine from the same institution, and specialized in Nephrology with a DM degree from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Sharma holds advanced certifications in Interventional Nephrology and Renal Transplantation from reputed international bodies. His particular expertise lies in chronic kidney disease management, diabetic nephropathy, and glomerulonephritis. He has successfully conducted over 500 percutaneous renal biopsies and mentored numerous residents. Published in several national and international journals, Dr. Sharma is recognized for his patient-centric approach and commitment to advancing renal care in India.

Dr. Priya Desai is an accomplished Nephrologist specializing in pediatric and adolescent kidney diseases at Aster Prime Hospital with 16 years of dedicated experience. She obtained her MBBS from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad, pursued MD in Pediatrics from CMC Vellore, and completed DM in Nephrology from Gandhi Medical College, Mumbai. Dr. Desai holds specialized fellowship certifications in Pediatric Nephrology and Immunology. Her clinical interests encompass congenital kidney abnormalities, lupus nephritis, and immunoglobulin A nephropathy in young patients. She has pioneered several awareness programs on kidney health among school children and actively participates in research on pediatric renal disorders. Dr. Desai's empathetic approach and expertise have significantly improved outcomes in complex pediatric cases.

Dr. Vikram Reddy is a distinguished Consultant Nephrologist at Aster Prime Hospital with 28 years of comprehensive experience in acute and chronic renal failure management. He completed his MBBS from JIPMER Puducherry, followed by MD in General Medicine from KEM Mumbai, and specialized with a DM in Nephrology from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Krishnan subsequently obtained his DM in Nephrology from AIIMS Delhi, where he also completed a fellowship in renal transplantation. He is an expert in chronic kidney disease management, dialysis therapy, and renal replacement therapies. With over 25 publications in national and international journals, he actively contributes to kidney disease awareness programs. Dr. Krishnan has received recognition for his pioneering work in establishing dialysis units and nephrology services. His holistic approach to renal care has improved patient outcomes significantly.

Dr. Neha Patel is a consultant specializing in infectious diseases and tropical medicine with 12 years of experience. She completed her MBBS from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, and her MD in Internal Medicine from NIMS Hyderabad with a focus on infectious diseases. Dr. Patel holds certifications from the National Institute of Communicable Diseases and has completed specialized training in antimicrobial stewardship and infection control. Her expertise includes managing viral hepatitis, tuberculosis, and tropical infections endemic to Telangana. She has been instrumental in implementing infection control protocols at TX Hospitals and has published guidelines on antimicrobial resistance. Dr. Patel is passionate about epidemiology and has actively participated in public health initiatives across Hyderabad.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a highly accomplished Emergency Medicine consultant with 24 years of clinical experience at TX Hospitals, Banjara Hills. He completed his MBBS from AIIMS Delhi and pursued his MD in Emergency Medicine from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Sharma holds a post-doctoral fellowship in Trauma Management from the Royal College of Emergency Medicine, UK. His expertise spans acute trauma care, resuscitation protocols, and mass casualty management. He has successfully managed over 15,000 emergency cases and has published 18 research papers in national and international medical journals. Dr. Sharma is a certified Advanced Trauma Life Support (ATLS) instructor and has contributed significantly to developing emergency response protocols for the hospital. He is recognized for his outstanding patient outcomes in critical care scenarios.

Dr. Priya Deshmukh brings 16 years of specialized expertise in Emergency Medicine and Critical Care. She obtained her MBBS from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, followed by MD in Emergency Medicine from JIPMER Puducherry. Dr. Deshmukh completed a fellowship in Critical Care Medicine at CMC Vellore and holds certifications in Advanced Cardiac Life Support (ACLS) and Pediatric Emergency Care. Her specialization includes management of cardiopulmonary emergencies, acute abdomen cases, and pediatric emergencies. With over 12,000 documented emergency consultations, she has established herself as an expert in rapid diagnostic protocols. Dr. Deshmukh is an active member of the Indian Medical Association and regularly conducts emergency medicine workshops for junior doctors.

Dr. Vikram Singh Tomar is an exceptionally skilled Emergency Medicine specialist with 28 years of dedicated service in acute care settings. He completed his MBBS from KEM Hospital, Mumbai, and obtained his MS in Emergency Medicine from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad. Dr. Tomar holds additional qualifications in Toxicology and Disaster Medicine from prestigious institutions. His extensive experience includes management of poisoning cases, environmental emergencies, and disaster response. He has successfully led multiple disaster management operations and trained over 500 healthcare professionals in emergency protocols. Dr. Tomar is recognized internationally for his work in community-based emergency response systems and has been invited as a guest lecturer at several medical conferences.

Dr. Anjali Kapoor is a dynamic Emergency Medicine consultant specializing in acute infectious diseases and sepsis management with 14 years of professional experience. She completed her MBBS from NIMS Hyderabad and pursued her MD in Emergency Medicine from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Kapoor holds an additional DM in Critical Care from KEM Mumbai and is certified in Sepsis Management protocols. Her clinical expertise encompasses rapid assessment and management of infectious emergencies, including complicated dengue, enteric fever, and septic shock cases. She has contributed to 9 peer-reviewed publications and actively participates in infection control committees. Dr. Kapoor's innovative approaches to early sepsis identification have improved patient outcomes significantly at the hospital.

Dr. Arjun Reddy Nandakumar is an accomplished Emergency and Acute Care specialist with 20 years of comprehensive clinical experience. He graduated from JIPMER Puducherry and obtained his MD in Emergency Medicine from CMC Vellore. Dr. Nandakumar holds specialized certifications in Advanced Pediatric Life Support (APLS), Neonatal Resuscitation Program (NRP), and Emergency Ultrasound. His particular expertise includes pediatric emergencies, neonatal resuscitations, and point-of-care ultrasonography in acute settings. He has successfully mentored 45 resident doctors and has authored 12 research articles in reputed journals. Dr. Nandakumar's innovative use of bedside ultrasound for rapid diagnosis has become a benchmark protocol at TX Hospitals and has significantly reduced diagnostic delays in pediatric emergencies.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a highly accomplished orthopedic surgeon with 22 years of clinical experience specializing in trauma and joint replacement surgery. He completed his MBBS from AIIMS Delhi and pursued his MS in Orthopedics from the same prestigious institution. Dr. Sharma holds an MCh in Orthopedic Surgery from CMC Vellore and has completed advanced fellowships in hip and knee arthroplasty from reputed centers in Germany and Switzerland. He is an expert in complex joint replacements, arthroscopic procedures, and trauma management. With over 4,500 successful surgeries to his credit, Dr. Sharma is recognized for his innovative approach to minimally invasive orthopedic techniques. He regularly conducts workshops and training programs for junior surgeons and has published numerous research papers in national and international journals.

Dr. Priya Subramanyam brings 16 years of specialized expertise in pediatric orthopedics and spinal deformity correction. She completed her MBBS from NIMS Hyderabad, followed by MS in Orthopedics from Osmania Medical College. Dr. Subramanyam holds a DM in Pediatric Orthopedics from JIPMER Puducherry and has undergone specialized training in spinal fusion techniques at premier institutes in the United States. Her clinical interests include correcting scoliosis, kyphosis, and other developmental spinal disorders in children. She has successfully managed over 300 complex pediatric spinal cases and is known for her compassionate approach to young patients. Dr. Subramanyam actively contributes to medical education and has mentored numerous resident doctors in her field.

Dr. Vikram Singh Chauhan is an esteemed orthopedic surgeon with 28 years of extensive experience focusing on sports medicine and arthroscopic surgery. He graduated with MBBS from KEM Mumbai and obtained his MS in Orthopedics from the same institution. Dr. Chauhan completed his MCh in Sports Orthopedics from a renowned London-based center and holds international certifications in arthroscopic techniques. He has earned recognition as one of the leading sports orthopedic specialists in southern India, with a particular expertise in ACL reconstruction, rotator cuff repair, and cartilage restoration. Dr. Chauhan has served as the medical officer for several national sports teams and has authored over 30 peer-reviewed publications. His commitment to advancing orthopedic care has made him a sought-after consultant for athletic injuries.

Dr. Anjali Deshmukh is a distinguished orthopedic surgeon with 18 years of dedicated experience in hand and upper extremity surgery. She completed her MBBS from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, and pursued her MS in Orthopedics from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Deshmukh holds specialized certifications in hand surgery and has completed fellowships in microvascular surgery and hand reconstruction at prestigious European institutions. She specializes in treating complex hand trauma, nerve injuries, peripheral nerve surgery, and occupational hand disorders. With a patient-centric approach, Dr. Deshmukh has successfully restored function to numerous patients with severe hand injuries. She regularly participates in national and international conferences and has contributed significantly to advancing hand surgery techniques in India through her research and clinical innovations.

Dr. Arun Kumar Nair is a prominent orthopedic surgeon with 24 years of comprehensive experience in spine surgery and minimally invasive orthopedic procedures. He completed his MBBS from KEM Mumbai and his MS in Orthopedics from the Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research, Kolkata. Dr. Nair holds an MCh in Spine Surgery and is certified in endoscopic and percutaneous spine techniques. He has undergone advanced training in robot-assisted spine surgery and is proficient in treating degenerative disc disease, spondylolisthesis, and stenosis. Dr. Nair has pioneered several minimally invasive techniques in his region and has trained over 100 surgeons in these procedures. His clinical outcomes and patient satisfaction rates rank among the highest, making him a trusted name in complex spinal pathologies.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Neurologist with 26 years of clinical experience specializing in stroke management and cerebrovascular diseases. He completed his MBBS from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, followed by MD in General Medicine from AIIMS Delhi. Subsequently, he obtained his DM in Neurology from NIMS Hyderabad with additional fellowship training in Interventional Neurology from the National Institute of Neurosciences, Kolkata. Dr. Sharma is recognized for his expertise in acute ischemic stroke management, thrombectomy procedures, and cerebrovascular intervention. He has published over 40 research papers in peer-reviewed journals and serves as an expert consultant for neuroendovascular procedures. His dedication to advancing stroke care has made him a prominent figure in Hyderabad's neurology community.

Dr. Priya Ramakrishnan is an accomplished Neurologist with 18 years of specialized experience in pediatric neurology and developmental disorders. She obtained her MBBS and MD in Pediatrics from CMC Vellore, followed by DM in Neurology from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Ramakrishnan has completed advanced fellowships in Pediatric Neurology from the All India Institute of Medical Sciences and has extensive expertise in childhood epilepsy, developmental delay, and neurodevelopmental disorders. She has been instrumental in establishing pediatric neurology clinics at TX Hospitals and has trained numerous residents. Her research focuses on childhood seizure disorders and neurometabolic conditions, with numerous national and international publications.

Dr. Vikram Singh Patel brings 22 years of neurology expertise with a particular focus on movement disorders and Parkinson's disease. He graduated from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad, and completed his MD in General Medicine from JMF AIIMS, followed by DM in Neurology from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Patel subsequently pursued advanced fellowship training in Movement Disorders from the National Brain Research Centre, Delhi. He is an expert in deep brain stimulation procedures, dystonia management, and tremor disorders. His clinical acumen and research contributions have led to recognition from international movement disorder societies. He regularly conducts training workshops and has authored multiple chapters in leading neurology textbooks.

Dr. Ananya Desai is a leading Neurologist with 20 years of specialized practice in neuroimmunology and multiple sclerosis management. She completed her MBBS from KEM Mumbai, followed by MD in General Medicine from Grant Medical College. Her DM in Neurology was obtained from AIIMS Delhi, with additional subspecialty fellowship in Neuroimmunology from the Max Healthcare Institute. Dr. Desai has extensive expertise in managing autoimmune neurological disorders, demyelinating diseases, and immunological complications. She has established a comprehensive MS clinic at TX Hospitals and is actively involved in research on Indian cohorts with MS. Her publications have contributed significantly to understanding neuroinflammatory conditions in the Indian population.

Dr. Arun Kumar Nayak is a highly experienced Neurologist with 28 years of clinical practice specializing in epilepsy management and seizure disorders. He obtained his MBBS from JIPMER Puducherry and completed his MD in General Medicine from the same institution. His DM in Neurology was pursued at NIMS Hyderabad with advanced epilepsy fellowship from the Epilepsy Foundation Institute, Delhi. Dr. Nayak is an expert in surgical epilepsy, video-EEG monitoring, and presurgical evaluation. He has trained numerous residents and has established one of the region's most advanced epilepsy monitoring units. His extensive research in epilepsy management has resulted in numerous publications and recognition from national epilepsy societies.

Dr. Sneha Mukherjee is a renowned Neurologist with 19 years of expertise in neurodegenerative diseases and cognitive disorders. She completed her MBBS from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad, and obtained her MD in General Medicine from NIMS Hyderabad. Her DM in Neurology was acquired from AIIMS Delhi, followed by fellowship training in Dementia and Cognitive Disorders from the National Institute of Mental Health and Neurosciences, Bangalore. Dr. Mukherjee specializes in Alzheimer's disease, Parkinson's dementia, and frontotemporal dementia management. She has established a comprehensive memory clinic and conducts regular cognitive screening programs. Her contributions to understanding neurodegenerative disorders in Indian patients have been recognized through multiple awards and publications.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Senior Consultant in General Medicine with 28 years of extensive clinical experience. He completed his MBBS from AIIMS Delhi, followed by MD in Internal Medicine from the same institution. Dr. Sharma holds fellowships from the Royal College of Physicians, London, and is a Diplomate of the National Board of Examination in Internal Medicine. His specialization encompasses cardio-metabolic disorders, chronic disease management, and complex multi-system pathology. He has published over 45 research papers in peer-reviewed journals and is recognized for his expertise in managing diabetes mellitus, hypertension, and acute coronary syndromes. At TX Hospitals, Kachiguda, Dr. Sharma leads the General Medicine department and mentors junior physicians in evidence-based clinical practice.

Dr. Priya Desai is a compassionate Consultant specializing in Gastroenterology-related systemic diseases within General Medicine, with 16 years of clinical experience. She graduated with MBBS from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad, and obtained her MD in Internal Medicine from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Desai is a Fellow of the Indian College of Physicians and has specialized training in hepato-biliary disorders and tropical diseases. She has been instrumental in establishing diagnostic protocols for GI complications and infectious diseases prevalent in Hyderabad. Her academic contributions include publications on liver disease management and infectious disease epidemiology. She is proficient in performing bedside ultrasound and has extensive experience in managing complex abdominal presentations.

Dr. Viswanath Reddy Rao is an accomplished physician with 22 years of dedicated service in General Medicine and critical care. He obtained his MBBS from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, and completed his MD in Internal Medicine from JIPMER, Pondicherry. Dr. Rao is a trained intensivist with specialization in sepsis management, acute respiratory distress syndrome, and multi-organ failure. He holds certifications in Advanced Life Support and Critical Care Medicine from international bodies. With keen interest in medical education, he has trained over 200 residents during his tenure. His expertise in managing complicated acute illnesses and his calm demeanor in crisis situations make him invaluable in both ward and critical care settings at TX Hospitals.

Dr. Sunita Patel is a dedicated Consultant in General Medicine with 19 years of progressive clinical experience, specializing in infectious diseases and immunocompromised patient care. She completed her MBBS from CMC Vellore, Tamil Nadu, and earned her MD in Internal Medicine from the same prestigious institution. Dr. Patel pursued a fellowship in Tropical Medicine and has advanced training in HIV/AIDS management and opportunistic infection prophylaxis. She has been involved in public health initiatives addressing tuberculosis and vector-borne diseases in the Hyderabad region. Her publications focus on antimicrobial resistance patterns and community health interventions. She is fluent in multiple regional languages and renowned for patient counseling and preventive medicine advocacy.

Dr. Ashok Kumar Gupta is a highly respected Senior Consultant in General Medicine with 26 years of exceptional clinical acumen and specialization in nephrology-related systemic disorders. He obtained his MBBS from KEM Mumbai and completed his MD in Internal Medicine from the same institution. Dr. Gupta holds additional qualifications including DM in Nephrology from AIIMS Delhi and is a Fellow of the Indian Society of Nephrology. His expertise encompasses chronic kidney disease management, acute kidney injury resuscitation, and electrolyte disorders. He has pioneered several innovative protocols for pre-dialytic patient care and has been instrumental in improving patient outcomes. His mentorship and clinical judgment have significantly contributed to TX Hospitals' reputation in managing complex renal pathologies.

Dr. Divya Sharma is an energetic and innovative physician with 12 years of experience in General Medicine, with particular emphasis on endocrinology and metabolic disorders. She graduated from NIMS Hyderabad and completed her MD in Internal Medicine from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad. Dr. Sharma holds a diploma in Diabetology from the Indian College of Physicians and has specialized training in thyroid disorders, metabolic syndrome, and hormonal imbalances. She is passionate about preventive medicine and lifestyle modification counseling, having successfully implemented comprehensive diabetes management programs. Her interest in evidence-based practice and continuous medical education has resulted in numerous publications and presentations at national conferences. She is recognized for her patient-centric approach and skill in managing complex endocrine emergencies.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Senior Consultant in Joint Replacement Surgery at TX Hospitals, Kachiguda, with over 25 years of clinical experience. He holds an MS in Orthopedic Surgery from AIIMS Delhi and a fellowship in Advanced Joint Replacement from the prestigious Rothman Institute, USA. Dr. Sharma specializes in hip and knee arthroplasty, complex revision surgeries, and robot-assisted orthopedic procedures. A graduate of Delhi Medical College, he has published over 40 research papers in national and international journals and has been an invited speaker at numerous orthopedic conferences. His expertise includes managing complex fractures and degenerative joint diseases. Dr. Sharma is recognized for his patient-centric approach and has successfully trained numerous orthopedic residents during his illustrious career.

Dr. Priya Venkatesh Iyer is a Consultant Orthopedic Surgeon with a specialized focus on Sports Medicine and Arthroscopic Surgery at TX Hospitals, Kachiguda. With 18 years of experience, she completed her MS from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad, followed by a MCh in Orthopedic Surgery from CMC Vellore, one of India's most prestigious institutions. Dr. Iyer holds certifications in Sports Injury Management from the American Academy of Orthopedic Surgeons and has completed specialized fellowships in Arthroscopic and Reconstructive Surgery. She is particularly renowned for her expertise in ACL reconstruction, meniscal repairs, and rotator cuff pathology. An active member of the Indian Orthopedic Association, Dr. Iyer combines traditional surgical wisdom with cutting-edge minimally invasive techniques to provide optimal patient outcomes.

Dr. Vikram Singh Patel is a accomplished Consultant Orthopedic and Spine Surgeon with 22 years of dedicated service in the field. A graduate of Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, he completed his MS in Orthopedic Surgery from NIMS Hyderabad and subsequently pursued a DM in Spinal Surgery from Jipmer Institute of Medical Sciences, Puducherry. Dr. Patel specializes in minimally invasive spinal procedures, spinal trauma management, and complex spinal deformity corrections. He has extensive experience in endoscopic spine surgery and has completed advanced fellowships in Spine Surgery at leading centers. With multiple publications in peer-reviewed journals and a strong commitment to teaching, Dr. Patel has mentored numerous junior orthopedic surgeons. His compassionate approach combined with technical excellence makes him a trusted physician at TX Hospitals, Kachiguda.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished nephrologist with over 25 years of specialized experience in hemodialysis and vascular access management at Hyderabad Kidney Centre. He completed his MBBS from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, followed by MD in Internal Medicine and DM in Nephrology from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Sharma holds advanced certifications in interventional nephrology and has completed fellowships in peritoneal dialysis techniques from CMC Vellore. His expertise encompasses managing complex dialysis patients, acute kidney injury management, and arteriovenous fistula creation. He has published over 40 research papers in peer-reviewed journals and has trained more than 150 nephrology residents. Dr. Sharma is recognized nationally for his innovative approaches to improving dialysis adequacy and patient outcomes, earning him the prestigious 'Excellence in Nephrology' award in 2019.

Dr. Priya Anand Desai is a renowned consultant nephrologist specializing in pediatric dialysis and nocturnal hemodialysis, bringing 18 years of clinical excellence to Hyderabad Kidney Centre. She obtained her MBBS from Osmania Medical College and completed her MD in Pediatrics and DM in Nephrology from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Desai has undergone specialized training in nocturnal and home hemodialysis at leading European centers and holds certification in peritoneal dialysis management. Her sub-specialization focuses on optimizing dialysis for young patients and improving quality of life through innovative modalities. With experience managing over 200 pediatric dialysis patients, she has established protocols for school-friendly dialysis schedules. Dr. Desai's research on dialysis adequacy in growing children has been presented at international conferences, making her a sought-after speaker in pediatric nephrology circles.

Dr. Arun Venkataswamy is an accomplished interventional nephrologist and fistula specialist with 22 years of dedicated service at Hyderabad Kidney Centre, specializing in creating and maintaining complex vascular accesses. He completed his MBBS from KEM Mumbai, pursued MS in General Surgery and subsequently DM in Nephrology from JIPMER Puducherry. Dr. Venkataswamy has completed fellowships in interventional radiology and endovascular access procedures from prestigious institutes. His expertise includes managing catheter-related complications, performing complex fistula angioplasties, and addressing dialysis catheter infections. Having successfully created over 1,200 functional arteriovenous fistulas with exceptional patency rates, he has significantly contributed to reducing dialysis-related complications. Dr. Venkataswamy regularly conducts workshops on vascular access management and has mentored numerous fellows, establishing him as a leading authority in Indian interventional nephrology.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Pediatric Cardiologist with 22 years of clinical excellence at TX Hospitals, Kachiguda. Dr. Sharma holds certifications from the American Academy of Pediatrics and has completed advanced fellowships in fetal echocardiography. He has pioneered minimally invasive cardiac interventions for congenital heart defects in the region and has published over 35 peer-reviewed research papers. His expertise spans neonatal cardiac care, catheter-based interventions, and complex congenital anomalies. Dr. Sharma is recognized for his compassionate approach to family counseling and has mentored numerous young pediatricians in his field.

Dr. Priya Deshmukh is a renowned Pediatric Gastroenterologist and Hepatologist with 18 years of dedicated service. She obtained her MBBS from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad, and MD in Pediatrics from JIPMER Puducherry. She further specialized with a DM in Pediatric Gastroenterology from KEM Mumbai. Dr. Deshmukh is certified in pediatric endoscopy and has extensive experience in managing complex liver disorders, malabsorption syndromes, and inflammatory bowel disease in children. She has established the Pediatric Gastroenterology clinic at TX Hospitals and has conducted numerous community awareness programs on nutrition and digestive health. Dr. Arun Krishnan is a highly skilled Pediatric Neurologist with 25 years of extensive experience in pediatric neurology and developmental medicine. He completed his MBBS from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, and pursued MD in Pediatrics from AIIMS Delhi, followed by a specialized DM in Pediatric Neurology from the National Institute of Mental Health and Neurosciences (NIMHANS), Bangalore. Dr. Krishnan is proficient in EEG interpretation, neuroimaging analysis, and management of epilepsy, developmental disorders, and neurodegenerative conditions. He holds memberships in international pediatric neurology associations and has presented his research at numerous global conferences. His clinical expertise has significantly improved seizure management outcomes and early developmental intervention protocols.

Dr. Meera Patel is an accomplished Neonatologist and Pediatric Intensivist with 16 years of experience in critical care pediatrics. She obtained her MBBS from CMC Vellore and MD in Pediatrics from NIMS Hyderabad, with specialized training (DM) in Neonatology from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Patel is certified in Neonatal Resuscitation Program (NRP) and holds advanced certifications in Pediatric Advanced Life Support (PALS). She has successfully managed high-risk neonates, premature infants, and critically ill children, with particular expertise in respiratory support and infectious disease management in ICU settings. Dr. Patel has established evidence-based protocols for sepsis management and has been instrumental in reducing neonatal mortality rates at TX Hospitals.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a renowned consultant nephrologist at Hyderabad Kidney Centre with 28 years of clinical experience in adult nephrology and chronic kidney disease management. He completed his MD in Internal Medicine from AIIMS Delhi, followed by DM Nephrology from Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) Chandigarh. Dr. Sharma holds additional fellowships in interventional nephrology from the European Renal Association and is an expert in hemodialysis access management, vascular interventions, and complex renal disorders. He has published over 40 peer-reviewed articles and serves as an examiner for various medical boards. His expertise includes diabetic nephropathy management, hypertension-related kidney disease, and acute kidney injury management in critical care settings. Dr. Sharma is a life member of the Indian Society of Nephrology and actively contributes to kidney disease awareness programs.

Dr. Priya Reddy Venkatesh is a specialist in pediatric and adolescent nephrology with 16 years of dedicated experience in managing renal disorders in children. She earned her MD Pediatrics from Gandhi Medical College Hyderabad and pursued her DM Nephrology from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Venkatesh completed a specialized fellowship in pediatric nephrology from CMC Vellore and has additional certification in renal transplantation and immunosuppression protocols. Her areas of expertise include congenital renal anomalies, glomerulonephritis in children, genetic kidney disorders, and nephrotic syndrome management. She has authored multiple chapters in pediatric nephrology textbooks and is passionate about early detection of kidney disease in children. Dr. Venkatesh regularly conducts school health camps for renal screening and is an active member of the Indian Academy of Pediatrics.

Dr. Arun Kumar Thakur brings 22 years of expertise in renal transplantation, immunology, and post-transplant management at Hyderabad Kidney Centre. He completed his MD Internal Medicine from KEM Hospital Mumbai, followed by DM Nephrology from JIPMER Puducherry with an additional MCh in Transplant Surgery from a premier institution. Dr. Thakur is a recognized expert in HLA typing, immunosuppressive protocols, and managing transplant complications. He has successfully managed over 600 renal transplant cases and maintains excellent long-term graft outcomes. His research includes studies on antibody-mediated rejection and tolerance induction. Dr. Thakur holds certifications in clinical immunology and serves as a consultant for complex transplant-related immunological issues. He is an accomplished speaker at national and international nephrology conferences and mentors younger nephrologists in transplant medicine.

Dr. Deepa Sharma Gupta is a highly specialized nephrologist focusing on kidney disease in pregnancy, lupus nephritis, and systemic autoimmune renal diseases with 18 years of clinical experience. She completed her MD Internal Medicine from Osmania Medical College Hyderabad and obtained her DM Nephrology from AIIMS Delhi with distinction. Dr. Gupta holds specialized fellowships in clinical immunology and rheumatology from international institutions and has received additional training in renal biopsy interpretation. She has contributed significantly to research in pregnancy-related kidney diseases and has published extensively in national and international journals. Her clinical expertise includes managing ANCA-associated vasculitis, membranoproliferative glomerulonephritis, and IgA nephropathy. Dr. Gupta is an established opinion leader in autoimmune nephrology and frequently provides consultation for complex immunological renal disorders across India.

Dr. Priya Chatterjee is a renowned Gynecologist and Obstetrician with 24 years of clinical experience at TX Hospitals, Kachiguda. She completed her MBBS from AIIMS Delhi, followed by MD in Obstetrics and Gynecology from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Chatterjee is an esteemed expert in high-risk pregnancies, maternal-fetal medicine, and complicated obstetrics. She holds certifications from the Royal College of Obstetricians and Gynaecologists (RCOG), London, and has completed a fellowship in Fetal Medicine from CMC Vellore. With over two decades of experience, she has successfully managed over 8,000 deliveries, specializing in intrauterine growth restriction, gestational diabetes, and preeclampsia management. Dr. Chatterjee is actively involved in medical education and regularly contributes to international medical journals and conferences.

Dr. Anjali Reddy is a distinguished Gynecological Oncologist with 19 years of specialized experience in cancer management. She earned her MBBS from Osmania Medical College, followed by MS in Obstetrics and Gynecology from Gandhi Medical College. Subsequently, she completed a DM in Gynecological Oncology from AIIMS Delhi and pursued advanced fellowship training in robotic surgery and chemotherapy protocols at KEM Mumbai. Dr. Reddy specializes in cervical, ovarian, and endometrial cancers, having performed over 2,000 oncological procedures. She is proficient in laparoscopic and robotic-assisted surgeries and has pioneered several minimally invasive cancer treatment protocols at TX Hospitals. Her research on early cancer detection has been published in national and international medical journals.

Dr. Meera Kapoor is an accomplished Reproductive Medicine specialist with 17 years of expertise in fertility treatment and assisted reproductive technologies. She completed her MBBS from JIPMER, Puducherry, and MD in Obstetrics and Gynecology from NIMS Hyderabad, followed by a specialized fellowship in Reproductive Medicine from CMC Vellore. Dr. Kapoor is certified by the Indian Society for Assisted Reproduction (ISAR) and holds memberships in international fertility organizations. With over 15,000 assisted reproductive cycles to her credit, she specializes in IVF, IUI, fertility preservation, and endometriosis management. Dr. Kapoor has established one of the most successful fertility centers at TX Hospitals with pregnancy success rates exceeding 65% in younger age groups, significantly improving countless family's lives.

Dr. Vidya Sharma is a leading Gynecological Endocrinologist with 22 years of dedicated practice in hormonal and metabolic disorders affecting women. She obtained her MBBS from AIIMS Delhi and MS in Obstetrics and Gynecology from Osmania Medical College. Dr. Sharma completed a specialized postdoctoral fellowship in Reproductive Endocrinology from KEM Mumbai and holds certifications from the American College of Obstetricians and Gynecologists (ACOG). Her expertise encompasses PCOS management, thyroid disorders, irregular menstrual cycles, and menopausal health management. Dr. Sharma has authored multiple research papers on hormonal aberrations in Indian women and has trained numerous junior gynecologists. She combines evidence-based medicine with holistic treatment approaches, providing comprehensive care to over 12,000 patients.

Dr. Sunita Malhotra is an esteemed Urogynaecologist and Pelvic Floor Specialist with 20 years of clinical excellence at TX Hospitals, Kachiguda. She completed her MBBS from Gandhi Medical College and MS in Obstetrics and Gynecology from NIMS Hyderabad, followed by a specialized fellowship in Urogynaecology from JIPMER, Puducherry. Dr. Malhotra specializes in pelvic floor dysfunction, urinary and fecal incontinence, pelvic organ prolapse, and complex pelvic reconstruction surgeries. She is proficient in advanced minimally invasive procedures including mid-urethral sling procedures and robotic reconstructive surgeries. With extensive expertise in managing 9,000+ patients, Dr. Malhotra has significantly improved quality of life for women suffering from pelvic floor disorders and has delivered numerous lectures at national and international gynecological conferences.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a Senior Consultant in Renal Transplantation with over 22 years of experience in transplant surgery. He completed his MS in General Surgery from AIIMS Delhi, followed by a specialized MCh in Transplant Surgery from CMC Vellore. Dr. Sharma has performed over 1,800 successful kidney transplants and specializes in living donor and deceased donor transplantation with expertise in complex immunological cases and sensitized recipients. He holds fellowships from the American Society of Transplant Surgeons and the International Society of Nephrology. His research contributions include pioneering work on desensitization protocols and post-transplant outcomes in Indian populations. Dr. Sharma has been instrumental in establishing the transplant services at Hyderabad Kidney Centre and is actively involved in donor counseling and recipient education programs.

Dr. Anjali Verma is a renowned Transplant Nephrologist with 18 years of clinical practice, specializing in pre- and post-transplant nephrology management. She obtained her MD in Medicine from NIMS Hyderabad, followed by a DM in Nephrology from JIPMER Puducherry. Dr. Verma has completed advanced fellowships in transplant nephrology from leading centers in Europe and has expertise in immunosuppressive protocols, rejection management, and chronic allograft dysfunction. She has published extensively on renal function monitoring and long-term transplant outcomes. With a patient-centric approach, Dr. Verma manages over 300 transplant patients annually and is recognized for her exceptional skills in managing complex medical complications post-transplantation. She also leads the hospital's transplant immunology and HLA matching program.

Dr. Suresh Chandra Rao is a highly experienced Transplant Immunologist with 20 years of specialized expertise in HLA typing, crossmatching, and immunological assessment for transplant candidates. He completed his MD in Microbiology and Immunology from Osmania Medical College, complemented by a specialized certification in Transplant Immunology from the National Institute of Immunohaematology, Mumbai. Dr. Rao has pioneered several advanced immunological protocols at the center, including flow cytometry-based crossmatching and donor-specific antibody detection. His expertise extends to managing sensitized recipients through desensitization and ABO-incompatible transplants. With over 500 HLA-matched transplants facilitated annually, Dr. Rao's meticulous immunological workup has significantly contributed to improved transplant outcomes and reduced acute rejection rates at the institution.

Dr. Deepika Singh Mehta is a compassionate Transplant Coordinator and Clinical Specialist with 15 years of experience in comprehensive transplant management and patient care. She holds an MS in General Surgery from KEM Hospital Mumbai and a specialized diploma in Transplant Coordination from the International Transplant Association. Dr. Mehta specializes in living donor evaluation, recipient assessment, and perioperative management of transplant patients. She is an expert in managing transplant-related complications and has developed innovative patient education programs that have significantly improved medication adherence and long-term graft survival rates. Her holistic approach encompasses pre-transplant counseling, donor-recipient coordination, and post-operative follow-up. Dr. Mehta is recognized for her empathetic patient interactions and has been instrumental in increasing organ donation rates in the region.

Dr. Vikram Kumar Deshmukh is a distinguished Transplant Urologist with 24 years of specialized experience in urological complications following renal transplantation. He graduated with an MS in Urology from Gandhi Medical College Hyderabad and completed his MCh in Urology with a subspecialty focus on transplant urology from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Deshmukh has expertise in ureteric complications, urinary tract infections in transplant patients, and interventional procedures including endoscopic management of transplant-related issues. He has performed over 2,000 transplant-related urological procedures with minimal morbidity.
