Dr. Vikram Singh Patel is a distinguished cardiac electrophysiologist and arrhythmia specialist with 22 years of clinical practice. He earned his MBBS from KEM Mumbai, completed MD Internal Medicine at AIIMS Delhi, and pursued DM Cardiology from Christian Medical College Vellore with additional fellowship training in Electrophysiology from Max Healthcare Institute. Dr. Patel has pioneered catheter ablation techniques in Hyderabad and has successfully managed over 5,000 arrhythmia cases including complex atrial fibrillation, ventricular tachycardia, and sudden cardiac death risk stratification. His expertise extends to device therapy including permanent pacemakers, implantable cardioverter-defibrillators, and cardiac resynchronization therapy. Dr. Patel has contributed significantly to cardiac electrophysiology training in India and serves as an examiner for the Board of Cardiology examinations.

Dr. Rajesh Sharma is a senior Emergency Medicine consultant at Osmania General Hospital with 28 years of clinical experience. He completed his MBBS from Osmania Medical College and pursued his MD in Emergency Medicine from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Sharma holds additional certifications in Advanced Trauma Life Support (ATLS) and Advanced Cardiovascular Life Support (ACLS) from the American College of Surgeons. He specializes in trauma management and acute cardiovascular emergencies, having successfully managed over 15,000 critical cases throughout his career. His expertise includes rapid assessment protocols, emergency resuscitation techniques, and wilderness medicine. Dr. Sharma has published 12 peer-reviewed research papers on trauma outcomes and has mentored numerous junior doctors. He is a member of the Indian Association of Emergency Medicine and regularly conducts training workshops for paramedics and junior physicians.

Dr. Anjali Kapoor is an accomplished Emergency Medicine specialist with 15 years of dedicated practice in acute care settings. She obtained her MBBS from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, followed by MD in Emergency Medicine from NIMS, Hyderabad. Dr. Kapoor pursued a 6-month fellowship in Toxicology and Poisoning Management from CMC Vellore. She is particularly skilled in managing acute poisoning cases, pediatric emergencies, and obstetric complications. With ACLS and Pediatric Advanced Life Support (PALS) certifications, she has handled numerous high-risk emergency cases with remarkable success rates. Dr. Kapoor has authored 8 research papers on poisoning epidemiology and developed emergency protocols adopted across several hospitals. She is passionate about emergency medicine education and conducts regular simulation-based training programs for medical students and residents at the hospital.

Dr. Vikram Desai brings 22 years of extensive experience in Emergency and Trauma Medicine. He completed his MBBS from Topiwala National Medical College, Mumbai, and obtained his MD in Emergency Medicine from KEM Hospital, Mumbai. Dr. Desai subsequently completed a 1-year fellowship in Emergency Trauma Care from the University of Edinburgh. His specialization encompasses polytrauma management, orthopedic emergencies, and acute respiratory distress syndrome. He holds dual certifications in ATLS and Emergency Management of Severe Burns (EMSB). Throughout his career, Dr. Desai has established trauma protocols now used across multiple institutions. He has presented research at international conferences and authored 15 peer-reviewed publications. Currently, he serves as the Trauma Coordinator at Osmania General Hospital and actively participates in disaster management exercises and disaster preparedness planning for the hospital network.

Dr. Priya Menon is a young, dynamic Emergency Medicine physician with 12 years of clinical experience specializing in acute neurological emergencies and stroke management. She obtained her MBBS from JIPMER, Puducherry, and completed her MD in Emergency Medicine from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Menon pursued advanced training in Neuro-Emergencies through a fellowship program at National Institute of Mental Health and Neurosciences (NIMHANS), Bangalore. She possesses certifications in Stroke Life Support and Basic Cardiac Life Support (BLS), with expertise in managing acute ischemic strokes, intracranial hemorrhages, and status epilepticus. Dr. Menon has contributed 10 publications on neurological emergencies and developed rapid stroke protocols implemented at her hospital. Her compassionate approach to emergency care combined with technical excellence has earned recognition as a mentor to junior residents. She actively promotes community awareness regarding stroke recognition and early intervention.

Dr. Arjun Gupta is a highly skilled Emergency Medicine specialist with 18 years of practice focused on critical care and medical emergencies. He completed his MBBS from Maulana Azad Medical College, New Delhi, followed by MD in Emergency Medicine from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Gupta obtained postgraduate certification in Critical Care Medicine from Christian Medical College, Vellore. His areas of expertise include sepsis management, acute heart failure, respiratory emergencies, and multiorgan failure management. Holding certifications in ACLS, BLS, and Intensive Care Life Support (ICLS), he has managed numerous life-threatening conditions with excellent patient outcomes. Dr. Gupta has co-authored 9 research papers on critical care protocols and contributed to guidelines for sepsis management adopted regionally. He is known for his innovative approaches to emergency resource management and has developed cost-effective emergency care protocols particularly beneficial for resource-limited settings.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished General Surgeon with 24 years of clinical experience at Osmania General Hospital. He completed his MBBS from Osmania Medical College and obtained his MS in General Surgery from AIIMS Delhi. He specializes in laparoscopic and minimal invasive surgeries, having performed over 8,000 successful procedures. Dr. Sharma holds certifications in Advanced Trauma Life Support (ATLS) and Critical Care Surgery. He completed a prestigious fellowship in Minimally Invasive Surgery from CMC Vellore and has published numerous research papers in national medical journals. His expertise includes cholecystectomy, appendectomy, and hernia repair procedures. Dr. Sharma is recognized for his exceptional surgical skills and mentorship of junior surgeons in the department.

Dr. Anita Patel is a highly skilled surgical oncologist with 19 years of experience specializing in cancer surgery within General Surgery at Osmania General Hospital. She earned her MBBS from Gandhi Medical College and completed her MS in General Surgery from NIMS Hyderabad, followed by a DM in Surgical Oncology from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Patel has successfully managed over 4,500 oncological cases including colorectal, gastric, and breast cancers. She holds fellowships from the American College of Surgeons (FACS) and has attended international surgical conferences. Her research focus includes neoadjuvant therapy outcomes and has authored multiple peer-reviewed publications. She is known for her compassionate patient care and multidisciplinary approach to cancer treatment.

Dr. Vikram Singh Reddy brings 16 years of expertise in emergency and acute care surgery to Osmania General Hospital's General Surgery department. He completed his MBBS from JIPMER Puducherry and obtained his MS in General Surgery from KEM Mumbai. Dr. Reddy specializes in trauma management, acute abdomen, and emergency surgical interventions, having handled thousands of critical cases. He holds advanced certifications in Trauma Surgery and Surgical Critical Care. Dr. Reddy completed a fellowship in Acute Care Surgery from a leading international institution. His clinical acumen in rapid decision-making and surgical management has significantly reduced mortality rates in emergency cases. He is actively involved in trauma education and frequently conducts workshops for surgical residents.

Dr. Neha Gupta is an accomplished General Surgeon with 14 years of specialized experience in hepatobiliary and pancreatic surgery at Osmania General Hospital. She completed her MBBS from Delhi University and obtained her MS in General Surgery from AIIMS Delhi. Subsequently, she completed her MCh in Hepatobiliary Surgery from CMC Vellore, one of India's premier institutions. Dr. Gupta has expertise in complex liver resections, pancreatic surgeries, and bile duct reconstructions. She has published extensively on hepatobiliary conditions and has presented research at national and international conferences. She holds certifications in Advanced Laparoscopic Hepatobiliary Surgery and is proficient in both open and minimally invasive approaches, making her a valuable asset to the surgical team.

Dr. Sanjay Kumar Mishra is a dedicated General Surgeon with 21 years of clinical practice, primarily focusing on colorectal and GI surgery at Osmania General Hospital. He obtained his MBBS from Osmania Medical College and completed his MS in General Surgery from NIMS Hyderabad with distinction. Dr. Mishra completed a DM in Colorectal Surgery from AIIMS Delhi and holds certifications in Advanced Endoscopic Surgery. His expertise includes complex colorectal cancer management, inflammatory bowel disease surgery, and advanced endoscopic procedures. With over 3,000 colorectal procedures performed, he is recognized as a leading colorectal surgeon in Hyderabad. He actively participates in medical education, trains residents, and has contributed significantly to surgical literature with multiple publications.

Dr. Priya Bharati Rao is an experienced General Surgeon with 12 years of specialized practice in vascular and endocrine surgery at Osmania General Hospital. She completed her MBBS from Gandhi Medical College and obtained her MS in General Surgery from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Rao further specialized with a DM in Vascular Surgery from AIIMS Delhi and holds fellowships in Advanced Vascular and Endocrine Surgery. She has successfully managed complex vascular conditions, thyroid disorders, and adrenal pathologies. With expertise in both open and endovascular techniques, Dr. Rao is proficient in carotid surgeries, aortic repairs, and advanced endocrine procedures. She maintains a strong commitment to patient education and has authored several research papers on vascular diseases and thyroid management.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished orthopedic surgeon specializing in joint replacement and arthroplasty with 28 years of clinical experience. He completed his MBBS from Osmania Medical College and obtained his MS in Orthopedic Surgery from AIIMS Delhi, followed by a prestigious fellowship in joint replacement from Apollo Hospitals. Dr. Sharma has successfully performed over 5,000 joint replacement surgeries and is recognized for pioneering minimally invasive techniques in hip and knee arthroplasty. He holds certifications from the American Academy of Orthopedic Surgeons and has published 35 research papers in national and international journals. His expertise in robotic-assisted orthopedic surgery has earned him recognition as one of Hyderabad's leading orthopedic surgeons, with a special focus on geriatric joint care.

Dr. Priya Sharma Deshmukh brings 16 years of specialized experience in sports medicine and arthroscopy, having completed her MBBS from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, and MS Orthopedics from JIPMER Puducherry. She obtained her fellowship in arthroscopic surgery from CMC Vellore and completed an advanced sports medicine course from the European College of Orthopedic Surgery. Dr. Deshmukh is renowned for her expertise in ACL reconstruction, meniscal repair, and shoulder arthroscopy. She serves as the team orthopedic consultant for multiple national sports teams and has mentored numerous young orthopedic residents. Her contributions to sports injury prevention programs have impacted thousands of athletes across India.

Dr. Anand Vijaykumar Kulkarni is an eminent orthopedic spine surgeon with 22 years of progressive experience in complex spinal procedures. He completed his MBBS from Karnataka Institute of Medical Sciences and pursued his MS in Orthopedics from NIMS Hyderabad, followed by a DM in Spine Surgery from Delhi's premier institutions. Dr. Kulkarni has undergone additional training in minimally invasive spine surgery (MISS) and endoscopic spine procedures from internationally acclaimed centers. With over 3,000 successful spinal surgeries including complex deformity corrections and tumor resections, he is a sought-after expert in degenerative disc disease and spinal trauma management.

Dr. Shalini Banerjee Roy is a pediatric orthopedic specialist with 14 years of dedicated experience in managing congenital and developmental orthopedic conditions in children. She obtained her MBBS from Maulana Azad Medical College, Delhi, and MS in Orthopedics from KEM Mumbai, with subsequent fellowship training in pediatric orthopedics at AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Roy specializes in clubfoot management, cerebral palsy orthopedic care, and limb deformity correction using advanced techniques. She has successfully managed over 2,000 pediatric orthopedic cases and has established rehabilitation programs for disabled children across Hyderabad. Her compassionate approach and innovative surgical techniques have made her a trusted name among parents and pediatricians.

Dr. Vikram Singh Rajput is a trauma and orthopedic surgeon with 19 years of experience specializing in complex fracture management and orthopedic trauma. He completed his MBBS from SMS Medical College, Jaipur, and MS Orthopedics from NIMS Hyderabad, with advanced fellowship in orthopedic trauma from Armed Forces Medical College. Dr. Rajput is an expert in internal fixation techniques, polytrauma management, and limb salvage procedures. He has published extensively on trauma management and serves as faculty for national orthopedic conferences. His expertise in handling challenging fracture cases and complication management has established him as a leading trauma orthopedist in the region.

Dr. Anjali Nair Menon is an accomplished orthopedic surgeon with 11 years of expertise in hand and microsurgery with special interest in peripheral nerve reconstruction. She completed her MBBS from Christian Medical College Vellore, MS in Orthopedics from Manipal University, and pursued advanced fellowship in hand and microsurgery from prestigious international centers including experience at leading UK hand centers. Dr. Menon specializes in complex hand fractures, tendon injuries, nerve repairs, and brachial plexus reconstruction. She has pioneered several innovative surgical techniques for nerve grafting and has been instrumental in establishing the hand surgery division at Osmania General Hospital, conducting regular training workshops for junior orthopedic surgeons.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Verma is a distinguished interventional cardiologist with 22 years of clinical experience at NIMS Hyderabad. He holds an MD in Internal Medicine from AIIMS Delhi and a DM in Cardiology from CMC Vellore. Dr. Verma specializes in coronary angioplasty, complex percutaneous coronary interventions (PCI), and acute myocardial infarction management. He completed a prestigious fellowship in interventional cardiology from Apollo Hospitals Chennai and obtained his FSCAI certification from the American College of Cardiology. With over 15,000 successful interventional procedures, he is recognized for his expertise in chronic total occlusions and bifurcation lesions. Dr. Verma has authored numerous peer-reviewed publications and conducts regular workshops on advanced interventional techniques across India.

Dr. Priya Sharma is an accomplished cardiologist specializing in cardiac imaging and echocardiography with 16 years of practice at NIMS. She earned her MD from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad, and completed her DM in Cardiology from JIPMER Puducherry. Dr. Sharma holds certification in advanced transoesophageal echocardiography (TEE) from European Society of Cardiology and has completed a fellowship in cardiac imaging from KEM Mumbai. Her expertise encompasses 3D echocardiography, strain imaging, and valvular heart disease assessment. She has contributed to multiple research projects focusing on preventive cardiology and cardiovascular risk stratification in Indian populations. Dr. Sharma is also an accomplished educator, mentoring residents and fellows in advanced cardiac imaging techniques.

Dr. Vikram Singh Rathore is a renowned electrophysiologist and cardiac arrhythmia specialist with 28 years of extensive experience. He completed his MD in Internal Medicine from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, and DM in Cardiology from AIIMS Delhi. His MCh in Cardiac Surgery from NIMHANS, Bangalore provides him a unique dual perspective. Dr. Rathore subspecializes in catheter ablation, implantable devices (pacemakers, ICDs, CRT systems), and complex arrhythmia management. He obtained his FHRS certification (Heart Rhythm Society) and completed advanced training at Mayo Clinic, USA. With expertise in atrial fibrillation ablation and ventricular arrhythmias, he has successfully performed over 5,000 electrophysiology procedures. Dr. Rathore is a recognized opinion leader who regularly conducts national and international training programs in electrophysiology.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a senior pediatrician specializing in Neonatology and Pediatric Intensive Care at Osmania General Hospital. He completed his MBBS from Osmania Medical College and pursued his MD in Pediatrics from AIIMS Delhi, followed by a DM in Neonatology from JIPMER Puducherry. With over 22 years of clinical experience, Dr. Sharma has established himself as an expert in managing high-risk neonates, premature infants, and critically ill children. He holds certifications in Advanced Life Support (ALS) and Pediatric Advanced Life Support (PALS) from the American Heart Association. Dr. Sharma has published over 40 research papers in national and international journals and has been instrumental in setting up the state-of-the-art NICU at Osmania General Hospital. His notable achievements include pioneering extracorporeal membrane oxygenation (ECMO) programs in Hyderabad and mentoring numerous junior pediatricians.

Dr. Priya Mahajan is a distinguished pediatric gastroenterologist with a focus on pediatric liver diseases and nutritional disorders. She graduated from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, and completed her MD in Pediatrics from NIMS Hyderabad. Subsequently, she pursued a DM in Pediatric Gastroenterology from CMC Vellore and completed a clinical fellowship in Hepatology at KEM Mumbai. With 18 years of dedicated service in pediatric gastroenterology, Dr. Mahajan specializes in managing celiac disease, inflammatory bowel disease, and pediatric cirrhosis. She is certified by the Indian Academy of Pediatrics and holds expertise in endoscopic procedures for pediatric patients. Dr. Mahajan has developed comprehensive protocols for managing malnutrition in children and has trained over 50 allied health professionals. Her research on pediatric liver transplantation outcomes has gained recognition in international forums.

Dr. Vikram Singh Rathod is a renowned pediatric cardiologist and electrophysiologist at Osmania General Hospital with over 25 years of experience. He completed his MBBS from CMC Vellore and obtained his MD in Pediatrics from AIIMS Delhi, followed by a DM in Pediatric Cardiology from the Madras Medical College. Dr. Rathod is a fellowship-trained pediatric cardiac electrophysiologist with training from leading international institutions. He specializes in congenital heart diseases, arrhythmias, and preventive pediatric cardiology. His expertise includes advanced echocardiography, cardiac catheterization, and transcatheter interventions. With numerous publications in prestigious journals and several international presentations, Dr. Rathod has significantly contributed to improving cardiac care outcomes for children in Telangana. He is an active member of the Indian Academy of Pediatrics and has established screening camps for early detection of congenital heart defects across rural Hyderabad.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a senior consultant in the ICU department at Osmania General Hospital with over 22 years of experience in critical care medicine. He completed his MBBS from Osmania Medical College and pursued his MD in Internal Medicine from AIIMS Delhi, followed by a DM in Critical Care Medicine from CMC Vellore. Dr. Sharma specializes in sepsis management, acute respiratory distress syndrome (ARDS), and multi-organ failure. He holds certifications in Advanced Cardiac Life Support (ACLS) and Critical Care Ultrasound from international bodies. With numerous publications in peer-reviewed journals and active involvement in critical care research, Dr. Sharma has been instrumental in establishing evidence-based protocols at the hospital. His expertise in managing complex ICU cases has earned him recognition as a mentor to junior intensivists, and he regularly conducts workshops on critical care management.

Dr. Priya Chatterjee is an accomplished ICU specialist with 16 years of clinical experience, focusing on cardiac critical care and hemodynamic monitoring. A graduate of Madras Medical College, she obtained her MD in General Medicine from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, and completed a prestigious fellowship in Cardiothoracic Critical Care at KEM Mumbai. Dr. Chatterjee is proficient in advanced life support techniques, mechanical ventilation, and echocardiography-guided hemodynamic assessment. She holds certifications in PALS, ACLS, and Transesophageal Echocardiography. Her clinical expertise extends to managing post-cardiac surgery patients and critically ill cardiac cases. Dr. Chatterjee has presented research papers at national and international conferences and is actively involved in training residents in cardiac critical care. Her compassionate patient care approach and clinical acumen make her invaluable to the ICU team.

Dr. Arun Prakash Verma is a highly skilled intensivist with 18 years of dedicated service in critical care medicine at Osmania General Hospital. He completed his MBBS from Nizam's Institute of Medical Sciences (NIMS) Hyderabad and earned his MD in Anaesthesiology followed by DM in Critical Care Medicine from JIPMER Puducherry. Dr. Verma specializes in neurocritical care, including management of traumatic brain injury, stroke, and status epilepticus. He is proficient in neuro-monitoring techniques, including ICP monitoring and EEG interpretation. With multiple certifications including Neurotrauma Advanced Certification and membership in the Indian Society of Critical Care Medicine, Dr. Verma has contributed significantly to improving outcomes in neurological emergencies. He is an active researcher with publications on neurotrauma management and serves as a mentor for critical care fellows.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a Senior Consultant in Emergency Medicine and Trauma Care at NIMS, bringing 24 years of clinical expertise. He completed his MBBS from AIIMS Delhi followed by MD in Emergency Medicine from NIMS Hyderabad. Additionally, he holds a DM in Critical Care Medicine from CMC Vellore and is certified by the American Heart Association (ACLS, PALS). Dr. Sharma has extensive experience in managing multi-trauma cases, acute coronary syndromes, and septic emergencies. He has published over 35 peer-reviewed articles in national and international journals and has been instrumental in establishing the hospital's Level 1 Trauma Center protocols. His expertise in resuscitation and emergency airway management has earned him recognition as a key opinion leader in Indian emergency medicine.

Dr. Priya Malhotra is a Consultant in Pediatric Emergency Medicine at NIMS with 16 years of dedicated experience in pediatric critical emergencies. She obtained her MBBS from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, followed by MD Pediatrics from Osmania Medical College. She completed a specialized fellowship in Pediatric Emergency and Critical Care from JIPMER, Puducherry, and holds PALS and APLS certifications. Dr. Malhotra specializes in neonatal resuscitation, pediatric shock management, and acute poisoning in children. She has conducted numerous workshops on pediatric emergency protocols across South India and has developed evidence-based guidelines for managing pediatric airway emergencies. Her compassionate approach combined with clinical excellence makes her invaluable in the Emergency Department.

Dr. Akhilesh Verma serves as a Senior Consultant in Emergency Medicine with focus on toxicology and environmental emergencies, contributing 19 years of experience at NIMS. He completed his MBBS from KEM Mumbai and pursued MD Emergency Medicine from NIMS. His specialized DM in Toxicology from AIIMS Delhi has made him an expert in poisoning cases, pesticide exposures, and environmental health emergencies. Dr. Verma is an accredited faculty member for toxicology training and has handled over 3,000 acute poisoning cases with remarkable outcomes. He has collaborated with WHO and ICMR on epidemiological studies of poisoning in India and has published extensively on emerging toxicological challenges. His expertise in organizing mass casualty management and disaster medicine protocols has been recognized nationally.

Dr. Neha Sharma is a Consultant in Emergency Medicine specializing in maternal and obstetric emergencies, with 12 years of specialized experience at NIMS. She completed her MBBS from CMC Vellore, followed by MD Emergency Medicine from NIMS Hyderabad and an advanced fellowship in Obstetric Critical Care from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Sharma holds certifications in ACLS, PALS, and Maternal Advanced Life Support (MALS). She excels in managing peripartum emergencies, eclampsia, amniotic fluid embolism, and obstetric hemorrhage. Her interdepartmental coordination has significantly improved maternal mortality outcomes in the Emergency Department. She has presented her research on maternal near-miss cases at international conferences and mentors junior residents in evidence-based emergency obstetric care.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Senior Consultant Orthopedic Surgeon specializing in Arthroscopic Surgery and Sports Medicine at NIMS Hyderabad. He graduated from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, followed by his MS in Orthopedic Surgery from AIIMS Delhi. With 24 years of clinical experience, Dr. Sharma has trained extensively at the Manchester Knee and Sports Injury Clinic in the UK. He holds multiple certifications including MCh in Sports Medicine from universities in Europe and is renowned for his expertise in ACL reconstruction, meniscal repairs, and rotator cuff surgery. He has successfully performed over 8,000 arthroscopic procedures and published 15+ peer-reviewed research papers. Dr. Sharma is also an accomplished arthroscopy instructor and has trained numerous surgeons across India.

Dr. Priya Desai is an accomplished Consultant Orthopedic Surgeon specializing in Pediatric Orthopedics and Deformity Correction at NIMS. She earned her MBBS from CMC Vellore and completed her MS Orthopedics from NIMS Hyderabad itself. With 18 years of dedicated experience, Dr. Desai pursued a specialized fellowship in Pediatric Orthopedic Surgery from Osmania Medical College and underwent additional training in limb lengthening and complex deformity corrections using Ilizarov and modern intramedullary techniques. She has handled over 2,000 pediatric cases ranging from congenital deformities to growth disturbances. Dr. Desai is recognized for her compassionate patient care and has successfully trained residents in advanced deformity correction techniques. She actively participates in national orthopedic conferences.

Dr. Vikram Singh Chouhan is a senior spine specialist and Associate Professor of Orthopedic Surgery at NIMS, with sub-specialization in Spine Surgery. He completed his MBBS and MS from JIPMER, Puducherry, and further pursued a DM in Spinal Surgery from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Chouhan brings 26 years of comprehensive experience in managing complex spinal disorders including degenerative disc disease, spinal stenosis, and traumatic spine injuries. He is certified in minimal invasive spine surgery and has mastered endoscopic discectomy techniques. Having performed over 3,500 spine surgeries with exceptional outcomes, Dr. Chouhan has published extensively in national and international journals. He is also an active mentor for spine surgery trainees and regularly conducts workshops on advanced spine techniques.

Dr. Anjali Kapoor is a renowned Joint Replacement and Trauma Surgeon at NIMS Hyderabad with 20 years of extensive surgical experience. She obtained her MBBS from KEM Mumbai and completed her MS in Orthopedic Surgery from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Kapoor subsequently earned her MCh in Orthopedic Surgery and specialized training in Total Joint Arthroplasty from reputed institutions in Europe and Singapore. She specializes in total knee replacement, total hip arthroplasty, and complex trauma fracture management using modern techniques. With over 4,500 joint replacement surgeries and 6,000 trauma cases managed successfully, Dr. Kapoor is known for her patient-centric approach and use of minimally invasive techniques. She has authored numerous research papers and actively trains orthopedic residents in advanced surgical methodologies.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Interventional Cardiologist and Cardiac Surgeon with 28 years of clinical experience at NIMS Hyderabad. He completed his MD in General Medicine from AIIMS Delhi, followed by his DM in Cardiology from the prestigious All India Institute of Medical Sciences. Subsequently, he pursued specialized training in Interventional Cardiology at the European Heart Institute, London. Dr. Sharma has performed over 8,500 coronary angioplasties and complex percutaneous coronary interventions. He holds certifications in Advanced Cardiac Life Support (ACLS) and is an internationally recognized expert in acute coronary syndrome management. His research work on thrombectomy techniques has been published in leading cardiology journals. Dr. Sharma has trained more than 150 cardiologists and continues to mentor residents in the department.

Dr. Priya Desai is a renowned Pediatric Cardiac Surgeon with 18 years of specialized experience in congenital heart disease management. She obtained her MS in General Surgery from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad, followed by an MCh in Cardiothoracic Surgery from CMC Vellore—one of India's premier institutions. Dr. Desai completed a prestigious fellowship in Pediatric Cardiac Surgery at the Toronto Sick Kids Hospital, Canada. She has successfully performed over 2,000 complex congenital heart surgeries with exceptional outcomes. Her expertise includes fetal cardiac interventions and device-assisted closures. Dr. Desai has established a robust pediatric cardiac surgery program at NIMS and is recognized nationally for her work in reducing surgical mortality in children with complex cardiac anomalies.

Dr. Arun Nagarajan is a highly skilled Cardiac Transplantation and Assist Device Specialist with 22 years of dedicated experience in advanced heart failure management. He earned his MS in General Surgery from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, and subsequently completed his MCh in Thoracic and Cardiovascular Surgery from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Nagarajan obtained advanced certification in Mechanical Circulatory Support from the Mayo Clinic, USA. He has pioneered left ventricular assist device (LVAD) implantation programs in South India and has successfully performed over 120 heart transplantations with excellent long-term survival rates. His clinical research on graft optimization has been presented at major international conferences. Dr. Nagarajan is instrumental in establishing NIMS as a tertiary center for end-stage heart failure management.

Dr. Meera Iyer is an expert Coronary Artery Bypass Surgery (CABG) and Complex Valve Reconstruction specialist with 25 years of surgical expertise. She completed her MS in Thoracic Surgery from KEM Mumbai and earned her MCh in Cardiac Surgery from JIPMER Puducherry. Dr. Iyer pursued advanced training in minimally invasive cardiac surgery at the Cleveland Clinic, USA. She has performed over 3,500 CABG procedures with meticulous attention to long-term graft patency and patient outcomes. Her specialization includes complex mitral valve repair and aortic valve reconstruction using innovative techniques. Dr. Iyer is a published researcher in cardiac surgery techniques and serves as faculty for national and international surgical training programs, contributing significantly to NIMS' reputation in cardiac surgery excellence.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a highly accomplished Senior Consultant in Surgical Oncology at Osmania General Hospital with over 22 years of clinical experience. He graduated from Osmania Medical College and completed his MS in General Surgery from AIIMS Delhi, followed by a specialized DM in Surgical Oncology from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Sharma is renowned for his expertise in gastrointestinal malignancies, colorectal cancer, and complex abdominal surgeries. He has completed fellowships in advanced laparoscopic oncological procedures from leading institutions and has published numerous research papers in national and international journals. His patient-centric approach, combined with minimally invasive surgical techniques, has earned him recognition across the region. Dr. Sharma actively mentors junior oncologists and is an associate member of the Indian Society of Surgical Oncology.

Dr. Priya Deshmukh is a distinguished Medical Oncologist with 18 years of dedicated experience in systemic cancer therapy and chemotherapy management. She obtained her MBBS from CMC Vellore and completed her MD in Internal Medicine from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, followed by a DM in Medical Oncology from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Deshmukh specializes in breast cancer, lymphomas, and leukemia management, with particular expertise in targeted therapy and immunotherapy protocols. She is certified by the Medical Council of India and has undergone specialized training in molecular oncology at international centers. Her research interests include precision medicine and personalized cancer treatment approaches. Dr. Deshmukh is actively involved in patient counseling, clinical trials coordination, and has mentored numerous oncology fellows throughout her career.

Dr. Anil Reddy Patel is an accomplished Radiation Oncologist serving at Osmania General Hospital with 16 years of specialized experience in cancer radiotherapy and brachytherapy. He completed his MBBS from Osmania Medical College and obtained his MD in Radiotherapy from JIPMER Puducherry. Subsequently, he pursued a DM in Radiation Oncology from AIIMS Delhi, where he specialized in advanced radiation techniques including IMRT, IGRT, and stereotactic body radiotherapy. Dr. Patel has expertise in head and neck cancers, thoracic malignancies, and gynecological cancers. He is a certified member of the Indian Association of Radiological and Allied Sciences and has presented research at international oncology conferences. His dedication to precision radiotherapy planning and dose optimization has significantly improved patient outcomes at the hospital.

Dr. Meera Sharma Iyer is a compassionate and skilled Pediatric Oncologist with 14 years of experience in treating childhood cancers and hematologic malignancies in children. She graduated from KEM Mumbai and completed her MD in Pediatrics from NIMS Hyderabad, followed by a super-specialized DM in Pediatric Oncology from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Iyer possesses extensive expertise in acute leukemias, lymphomas, solid tumors, and blood disorders in children. She is well-versed in chemotherapy protocols, supportive care, and psychosocial support for pediatric patients and their families. Dr. Iyer holds certifications in pediatric critical care and has completed fellowships in international pediatric cancer centers. She is an active member of the Indian Society of Pediatric Oncology and has significantly contributed to improving survival rates in her patient population through evidence-based treatment approaches.

Dr. Vikram Singh Chauhan is an esteemed Head and Neck Oncologist with 26 years of extensive experience in surgical and nonsurgical management of head and neck cancers. He obtained his MBBS from Delhi University and completed his MS in ENT from AIIMS Delhi, followed by a specialized MCh in Head and Neck Oncology from CMC Vellore. Dr. Chauhan is an authority on laryngeal, pharyngeal, and oral cancers, with particular expertise in reconstructive surgery and speech preservation techniques. He has trained extensively in robotic-assisted head and neck surgery and endoscopic resection techniques. Dr. Chauhan has published over 40 research articles and serves as an editorial board member for several oncology journals. His contributions to multidisciplinary cancer management and his commitment to academic excellence have made him a respected figure in Indian oncology.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Neurologist with 22 years of clinical experience in Stroke and Cerebrovascular Diseases. He completed his MBBS from AIIMS Delhi and subsequently obtained his MD in Neurology from NIMS Hyderabad. Further, he acquired his DM in Stroke and Interventional Neurology from Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) Chandigarh. Dr. Sharma holds international certifications in Advanced Cardiac Life Support (ACLS) and is certified in Stroke Prevention and Management. He has established the Comprehensive Stroke Center at NIMS and has trained over 200 residents in modern stroke care protocols. His expertise includes thrombolytic therapy, mechanical thrombectomy, and stroke prevention strategies. He has published 35+ peer-reviewed articles and regularly presents at national and international conferences.

Dr. Priya Menon is a highly accomplished Neurologist with 18 years of specialization in Epilepsy and Seizure Disorders. She earned her MBBS from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad, followed by MD in Neurology from NIMS. Subsequently, she completed her DM in Clinical Neurophysiology and Epilepsy Management from CMC Vellore. Dr. Menon is an accomplished epilepsy surgeon with extensive experience in pre-surgical evaluation, video-EEG monitoring, and seizure management protocols. She has pioneered telemedicine-based epilepsy care in rural Telangana, benefiting over 5,000 patients. Certified in Advanced Epilepsy Management, she has authored 28 publications and serves as a reviewer for multiple neurology journals. Her innovative approaches to difficult-to-treat epilepsy have earned her recognition at prestigious medical forums.

Dr. Vikram Singh Reddy is an eminent Neurologist specializing in Neurodegenerative Diseases with 25 years of clinical expertise. He completed his MBBS and MD in Neurology from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, and obtained his DM in Neurodegenerative Diseases from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Reddy is a recognized authority in Parkinson's Disease, Multiple Sclerosis, and Motor Neuron Disorders. He has completed advanced fellowships in Movement Disorders from the Movement Disorder Society and holds certifications in Deep Brain Stimulation (DBS) surgical planning. He has established a specialized Neurodegenerative Disease Center and has mentored 45+ fellows. Dr. Chauhan's MCh in Pediatric Surgery from AIIMS Delhi and his specialized fellowship in pediatric urology from premier Indian institutions have positioned him as an expert in his field. His areas of expertise include hypospadias repair, neurogenic bladder management, and ureteropelvic junction obstruction correction. He has successfully mentored numerous residents and has contributed significantly to the development of pediatric urology protocols, with over 35 published works to his credit.

Dr. Ananya Mukherjee is a distinguished Pediatric Surgeon with 16 years of experience specializing in abdominal wall defects, hernia repair, and neonatal surgery. She completed her MBBS from KEM Mumbai and pursued her MS in Surgery from the same institution before obtaining her MCh in Pediatric Surgery from NIMS Hyderabad. Dr. Mukherjee holds advanced certifications in neonatal and infant surgery and has undertaken specialized training in complex hernia reconstruction from international surgical centers. Her clinical practice focuses on gastroschisis management, omphalocele repair, and other congenital abdominal anomalies. She is known for her patient-centered approach and has been instrumental in achieving exceptional outcomes in high-risk neonatal cases at Rainbow Children's Hospital.

Dr. Sanjay Krishnamurthy is a veteran Pediatric Surgeon with over 26 years of comprehensive surgical experience, serving as a mentor and guide to the next generation of pediatric surgeons. He graduated with MBBS from CMC Vellore and completed both his MS in Surgery and MCh in Pediatric Surgery from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Krishnamurthy possesses specialized expertise in oncological pediatric surgery, managing pediatric tumors, and complex resections with reconstruction. He holds fellowships in pediatric surgical oncology and has received several national awards for his contributions to pediatric surgical care. His research interests include improved survival strategies for childhood malignancies, and he has presented numerous papers at international conferences, establishing himself as a thought leader in the field.

Dr. Meera Pillai is an accomplished Pediatric Surgeon with 14 years of focused expertise in hepato-pancreatic-biliary (HPB) surgery and laparoscopic interventions in children. She completed her MBBS from Rajendra Institute of Medical Sciences and her MS in Surgery from Osmania Medical College. Dr. Pillai obtained her MCh in Pediatric Surgery from JIPMER, where she specialized in complex biliary and pancreatic anomalies. She holds advanced certifications in pediatric hepatobiliary surgery and has completed fellowships at prestigious institutions in India and abroad. Her expertise encompasses biliary atresia management, choledochal cyst repair, and pediatric pancreatic conditions. Dr. Pillai is passionate about advancing minimally invasive techniques in pediatric HPB surgery and has established protocols that have significantly improved patient outcomes.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished pediatric cardiologist with 26 years of clinical experience in managing complex congenital heart diseases. He completed his MD Pediatrics from AIIMS Delhi, followed by a DM in Pediatric Cardiology from the prestigious Christian Medical College (CMC) Vellore. Dr. Sharma holds additional fellowships from Great Ormond Street Hospital, London, and specializes in fetal cardiology and prenatal diagnosis of cardiac anomalies. He has published over 40 peer-reviewed papers in national and international journals and is recognized for his expertise in trans-catheter closure techniques for ASD and PDA. At Rainbow Children's Hospital, he leads the Congenital Heart Disease intervention program and has successfully managed over 1000 complex cardiac cases, earning him the title of Best Pediatric Cardiologist in Telangana (2020).

Dr. Priya Verma brings 18 years of specialized experience in pediatric interventional cardiology and structural heart disease management. She obtained her MD from NIMS (National Institute of Medical Sciences) Hyderabad and pursued her DM in Pediatric Cardiology from CMC Vellore. Dr. Verma completed a prestigious fellowship in Interventional Pediatric Cardiology at All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS) Delhi and has expertise in balloon angioplasty, stent placement, and device closure procedures. She is particularly skilled in managing pulmonary hypertension in children and has developed innovative treatment protocols adopted across several cardiac centers. Dr. Verma has trained over 50 junior cardiologists and actively participates in research on cardiac biomarkers and gene therapy applications in pediatric heart disease.

Dr. Sanjiv Mahajan is an accomplished pediatric cardiologist with 22 years of experience and specialized expertise in rheumatic heart disease and acquired cardiac conditions in children. He completed his medical training with MD Pediatrics from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, followed by DM Pediatric Cardiology from Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) Puducherry. Dr. Mahajan pursued advanced training in echocardiography at KEM Hospital Mumbai and holds certifications in pediatric advanced life support. He is renowned for his expertise in performing complex pediatric cardiac surgeries coordination and has published 35 research papers on rheumatic heart disease prevention. His contributions to community health awareness programs have reduced acute rheumatic fever incidence in urban Hyderabad by 30% over the past decade.

Dr. Anjali Singh is a fellowship-trained pediatric cardiologist with 15 years of clinical expertise in cardiac arrhythmias and electrophysiology in children. She earned her MD Pediatrics from AIIMS Delhi and completed her DM in Pediatric Cardiology from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad. Dr. Singh obtained specialized training in pediatric electrophysiology from Royal Brompton & Harefield Hospital, London, and is adept at performing complex ablation procedures and pacemaker implantation in pediatric patients. She has established the first pediatric electrophysiology laboratory at Rainbow Children's Hospital and has successfully managed over 300 arrhythmia cases. Dr. Singh is an active member of the Indian Academy of Pediatric Cardiology and has presented her research on genetic predisposition to arrhythmias at international conferences.

Dr. Vikram Desai is a highly experienced pediatric cardiologist with 28 years of dedicated service in pediatric cardiac care and surgical coordination. He completed his MD from NIMS Hyderabad and obtained his DM in Pediatric Cardiology from CMC Vellore with additional MCh training in cardiac surgery. Dr. Desai has extensive experience in managing critical cardiac conditions including cardiomyopathies, myocarditis, and congenital heart disease requiring surgical intervention. He has successfully mentored numerous residents and fellows and is known for his innovative diagnostic approaches using advanced imaging modalities. Dr. Desai has authored 45 scientific publications and serves as a visiting consultant to multiple cardiac centers. His clinical expertise has contributed to a 95% survival rate in complex congenital heart surgeries at Rainbow Children's Hospital.

Dr. Meera Chattopadhyay is an accomplished pediatric cardiologist with 19 years of specialized experience in heart failure management and cardiac rehabilitation in children. She obtained her MD Pediatrics from CMC Vellore and completed her DM in Pediatric Cardiology from AIIMS Delhi with a focus on pediatric heart transplantation. Dr. Chattopadhyay holds certifications in pediatric echocardiography and advanced cardiac imaging and has pursued fellowship training at Great Ormond Street Hospital, London. She is recognized for her expertise in managing acute decompensated heart failure, dilated cardiomyopathy, and establishing comprehensive cardiac rehabilitation programs. Dr. Chattopadhyay has published 28 peer-reviewed articles on pediatric heart failure management and is passionate about community awareness on healthy childhood development and prevention of acquired cardiac diseases.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a highly experienced Neonatologist with 28 years of dedicated service in NICU care. He completed his MBBS from AIIMS Delhi and pursued his MD in Pediatrics from the same institution, followed by a specialized DM in Neonatology from CMC Vellore. Dr. Sharma holds certifications in Advanced Life Support (ALS) and Neonatal Resuscitation Program (NRP) from international bodies. His expertise spans high-risk neonatal intensive care, including management of extremely preterm infants, neonatal sepsis, and complex congenital anomalies. With over 15 published research papers in peer-reviewed journals, he has established himself as a thought leader in neonatal critical care. At Rainbow Children's Hospital, he leads the NICU team with a special focus on evidence-based practices and mentoring junior faculty. Dr. Sharma has received multiple awards for excellence in pediatric care and is a member of the Indian Academy of Pediatrics and Indian Neonatology Society.

Dr. Priya Deshmukh brings 18 years of expertise in Neonatal Respiratory Care and Pulmonary Management. She obtained her MBBS from KEM Mumbai and completed her MD in Pediatrics from JIPMER, Puducherry, followed by a DM in Neonatology from NIMS Hyderabad. She is a certified specialist in mechanical ventilation strategies and noninvasive respiratory support in neonates. Dr. Deshmukh has extensive experience in managing respiratory distress syndrome, bronchopulmonary dysplasia, meconium aspiration syndrome, and persistent pulmonary hypertension. She has developed innovative ventilation protocols that have significantly improved outcomes in preterm infants. With research interests in lung development and innovation in CPAP technology, she has contributed to several national and international conferences. Her clinical acumen combined with her research background makes her an invaluable asset to Rainbow Children's Hospital's NICU team, where she actively participates in quality improvement initiatives.

Dr. Anil Reddy Muppalla is a specialized Neonatologist with 22 years of experience, focusing on Neonatal Neurointensive Care and Developmental Neurology. He completed his MBBS and MD in Pediatrics from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad, and obtained his DM in Neonatology from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Reddy holds certifications in Neonatal Neurology and Neuro-Ultrasound from prestigious international institutes. He specializes in managing neonatal seizures, hypoxic-ischemic encephalopathy, intraventricular hemorrhage, and developmental care. His research on neuroprotective strategies in birth asphyxia has been published in international journals. He serves as an examiner for postgraduate pediatric courses and is actively involved in training resident doctors in neonatal neurocritical care.

Dr. Sneha Gupta is a compassionate Neonatologist with 16 years of experience, specializing in Neonatal Nutrition and Metabolic Management. Dr. Gupta is a certified specialist in Neonatal Parenteral and Enteral Nutrition and holds additional qualifications in Neonatal Pharmacology. Dr. Gupta is an active member of the Indian Society of Neonatology and has presented her research on optimal nutrition strategies at national conferences. Her holistic approach to patient care, combined with her attention to developmental outcomes, makes her an exemplary clinician at Rainbow Children's Hospital.

Dr. Vikram Tiwari is an accomplished Neonatologist with 24 years of clinical experience, specializing in Neonatal Infectious Diseases and Sepsis Management. He obtained his MBBS from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, and completed his MD in Pediatrics from the same institution, followed by a DM in Neonatology from JIPMER, Puducherry. Dr. Tiwari holds advanced certifications in Infection Control and Antimicrobial Stewardship. His dedication to infection prevention and evidence-based antibiotic therapy has significantly impacted patient outcomes at Rainbow Children's Hospital.

Dr. Anitha Subramanian is a dedicated Neonatologist with 20 years of experience, with a special interest in Neonatal Cardiac Care and Hemodynamic Management. Dr. Subramanian holds additional certifications in Echocardiography and Pediatric Critical Care. She specializes in managing hemodynamically significant patent ductus arteriosus, pulmonary hypertension, congenital cardiac anomalies, and shock states in neonates. Her expertise in bedside echocardiography has revolutionized NICU hemodynamic monitoring at Rainbow Children's Hospital. Dr. Subramanian has published extensively on neonatal cardiac issues and actively trains junior doctors in advanced ultrasound techniques. She is a member of the Indian Society of Pediatric and Congenital Heart Specialists and regularly participates in national conferences, contributing significantly to advancement of neonatal cardiac care standards.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Hematologist and Bone Marrow Transplant Specialist with 22 years of clinical experience. Dr. Priya Nair Menon is a renowned Pediatric Bone Marrow Transplant Specialist with 18 years of dedicated experience in treating children and adolescents. Dr. Arun Vishwanath Reddy is an experienced Hematologic Malignancy and BMT Surgeon with 25 years of professional expertise. Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a highly experienced Medical Oncologist with 22 years of clinical expertise in chemotherapy and systemic cancer treatment. Dr. Priya Verma is an accomplished Clinical Oncologist specializing in breast cancer chemotherapy and hormonal therapies with 18 years of professional experience. Dr. Arun Ravindran is a distinguished Medical Oncologist with 26 years of expertise in hematologic malignancies and intensive chemotherapy regimens. Dr. Meera Krishnamurthy is an esteemed Pediatric Oncologist with 16 years of specialization in chemotherapy for childhood malignancies. Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Emergency Medicine physician with over 22 years of clinical experience at MaxCure Hospitals, Madhapur. Dr. Priya Menon brings 18 years of exceptional expertise in Emergency Medicine with a specialized focus on pediatric emergency care and toxicology. She has trained over 300 junior doctors in pediatric emergency protocols and has authored multiple chapters in emergency medicine textbooks. Dr. Virender Singh Yadav is a highly accomplished Emergency Medicine specialist with 26 years of experience, having completed his MBBS from Osmania Medical College, Hyderabad, and his MD in Emergency Medicine from JIPMER Puducherry. Dr. Asha Patel is a talented Emergency Medicine practitioner with 14 years of specialized experience in gynecological emergencies and obstetric trauma management. Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished surgical oncologist with 24 years of clinical experience specializing in gastrointestinal and hepatobiliary malignancies. Dr. Priya Menon is an accomplished surgical oncologist with 18 years of expertise in breast and soft tissue malignancies. Dr. Vikram Singh Chauhan is a highly skilled surgical oncologist with 20 years of specialization in head and neck oncology. Dr. Anjali Deshmukh is an eminent surgical oncologist with 16 years of dedicated practice in thoracic and mediastinal oncology. Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a highly accomplished Radiation Oncologist with 22 years of clinical experience in the management of head and neck malignancies. Dr. Priya Venkatesh is an accomplished breast and gynecological oncologist with 16 years of specialized experience in breast cancer radiotherapy. Dr. Arun Krishnan Iyer is a distinguished Radiation Oncologist specializing in thoracic malignancies with 28 years of extensive clinical practice. Dr. Anjali Desai is a highly skilled Radiation Oncologist with subspecialization in pediatric oncology and central nervous system (CNS) malignancies, bringing 18 years of dedicated experience. Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a highly accomplished Clinical Pathologist with 24 years of exemplary experience in Laboratory Services at Rainbow Children's Hospital. Dr. Priya Deshmukh brings 18 years of dedicated expertise in Microbiology and Immunology to Rainbow Children's Hospital's Laboratory Services. Dr. Arun Venkatraman is a distinguished Clinical Biochemist with 22 years of specialized experience in Metabolic and Endocrine Disorders Laboratory Services. Dr. Neha Kapoor is an accomplished Molecular Pathologist with 16 years of progressive experience in advancing molecular diagnostic capabilities at Rainbow Children's Hospital. Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished neuroradiologist with 22 years of clinical experience in advanced imaging diagnostics. Dr. Priya Iyer brings 16 years of specialized expertise in breast imaging and oncological radiology. Dr. Amit Patel is an accomplished thoracic and cardiac radiologist with 19 years of experience in oncological imaging. Dr. Sanjana Deshmukh is a leading abdominal and gastrointestinal radiologist with 24 years of extensive clinical experience. Dr. Vikram Singh Tomar is an expert musculoskeletal and oncological radiologist with 18 years of professional experience in cancer imaging. Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Critical Care Specialist with 22 years of clinical experience at American Oncology Institute's ICU. Dr. Priya Malhotra brings 18 years of specialized experience in Oncological ICU management and respiratory critical care. Dr. Arun Mohan Nair is an accomplished Cardiac Intensivist with 24 years of experience managing cardio-oncological emergencies and hemodynamic complications in cancer patients. He is proficient in advanced hemodynamic monitoring, echocardiography, and temporary pacing techniques. Dr. Neha Singh is an expert in Neurological Critical Care with 16 years of specialized experience in managing neuro-oncological emergencies and complications. Dr. Vikram Patel is an accomplished Intensivist specializing in Sepsis and Infectious Diseases in Immunocompromised Patients with 20 years of experience. Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a Senior Consultant in Medical Oncology with 28 years of distinguished experience at American Oncology Institute. Dr. Priya Malhotra is a Consultant Medical Oncologist specializing in hematologic malignancies with 15 years of clinical experience. Dr. Vikram Singh Patel is an Associate Consultant with 12 years of experience, specializing in thoracic oncology and lung cancer management. Dr. Anjali Gupta is a Senior Medical Oncologist with 22 years of clinical practice, renowned for her expertise in breast cancer and gynecological malignancies. Dr. Deepika Nair is an Associate Consultant Medical Oncologist with 10 years of experience, specializing in melanoma, ovarian cancer, and molecular oncology. Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Immunoncologist with 28 years of experience in cancer immunotherapy. He has successfully managed over 15,000 trauma cases and is known for his exceptional outcomes in high-energy injuries. Dr. Anjali Iyer is a renowned pediatric orthopedic surgeon with 14 years of specialized clinical experience. Dr. Arun Krishnan is an accomplished spinal orthopedic surgeon with 20 years of extensive experience in complex spinal procedures. Dr. Krishnan is recognized for his innovative approaches in endoscopic spinal surgery and has been an invited speaker at multiple international conferences. His commitment to patient safety and optimal outcomes makes him a trusted spinal specialist.

Dr. Sneha Bhattacharya is a highly qualified orthopedic surgeon specializing in hand, wrist, and reconstructive surgery with 18 years of clinical expertise. She completed her medical degree from AIIMS Delhi and pursued an MS in Orthopedic Surgery with a special focus on hand surgery. Dr. Bhattacharya completed a fellowship in hand and microsurgery from the American Society for Surgery of the Hand. Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Senior Consultant in Radiation Oncology with over 25 years of clinical experience. Dr. Priya Menon brings 18 years of specialized experience in Radiation Oncology, specializing in gynecological and breast cancers. Dr. Vikram Singh Patel is a highly skilled radiation oncologist with 20 years of experience, specializing in thoracic malignancies and stereotactic body radiotherapy (SBRT). Dr. Anjali Srivastava is a compassionate and experienced Consultant Radiation Oncologist with 15 years of clinical practice, specializing in pediatric oncology and central nervous system malignancies. Dr. Harish Reddy Naidu is a renowned Consultant in Radiation Oncology with 22 years of expertise in prostate and genitourinary cancers. Dr. Neha Kapoor is a talented Consultant Radiation Oncologist with 12 years of experience, specializing in palliative radiotherapy and clinical research. Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a highly experienced Senior Consultant in Medical Oncology and Chemotherapy with 24 years of professional expertise. Dr. Anjali Kapoor is an accomplished Senior Consultant in Breast Cancer Chemotherapy with 22 years of clinical excellence. Dr. Rajesh Kumar Verma is a Senior Consultant in Neonatology at Apollo Children's Hospital with 18 years of specialized experience in managing critically ill neonates. She obtained her MBBS from KEM Mumbai and MD in Internal Medicine, followed by DM in Clinical Hematology from Mumbai University. Dr. Malhotra has developed innovative protocols for managing acute and chronic GVHD, resulting in improved patient outcomes and enhanced quality of life. She has supervised over 600 transplants and published extensively on GVHD prevention strategies. Her research interests include biomarker-driven treatment approaches and long-term follow-up care. Dr. Malhotra is recognized for her meticulous approach to patient monitoring and comprehensive supportive care during the critical post-transplant period.

Dr. Suresh Gopalan is a senior consultant specializing in HLA matching, graft selection, and donor management strategies with 30 years of extensive experience in bone marrow transplantation. He completed his MBBS from Osmania Medical College Hyderabad and MD in Internal Medicine from Hyderabad University, with advanced training including DM in Hematology from NIMS. He holds international certification in immunohematology and HLA typing from reputed organizations. Dr. Gopalan has orchestrated the coordination of over 1,200 donor-recipient pairs with exceptional outcomes. His expertise spans peripheral blood stem cell mobilization, bone marrow harvest techniques, and cryopreservation protocols. He is instrumental in establishing the hospital's state-of-the-art donor cell laboratory and has trained numerous technicians in transplant immunology. His contributions have significantly enhanced the hospital's transplant success rates.

Dr. Meera Choudhury is a specialized transplant hematologist focusing on non-myeloablative conditioning regimens and managing elderly and high-risk patients with 20 years of clinical experience. She completed her MBBS from JIPMER Pondicherry and MD in Internal Medicine followed by DM in Hematology from Madras University. She received advanced fellowship training in non-myeloablative BMT from prestigious centers and holds certifications in stem cell therapy. Dr. Choudhury specializes in managing patients previously deemed unsuitable for conventional BMT through innovative reduced-intensity conditioning protocols. She has successfully treated over 450 patients with comorbidities and advanced age, achieving remarkable survival outcomes. Her research contributes to expanding BMT eligibility criteria and improving outcomes in vulnerable patient populations. Dr. Choudhury is recognized for her patient-centric approach and commitment to optimizing quality of life alongside survival.

Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Emergency Medicine physician with 28 years of clinical experience in acute care management. He holds certifications in ACLS, PALS, and ATLS, and has trained over 500 residents in advanced emergency care. At Gandhi Hospital, he leads the emergency response team and specializes in managing complex multi-organ trauma cases.

Dr. Priya Vasudevan brings 15 years of expertise in Emergency and Critical Care Medicine, with special focus on sepsis management and infectious disease emergencies. Dr. Arun Narayan Pillai is an accomplished Emergency Medicine specialist with 22 years of dedicated service in acute care settings. Dr. Vikram Reddy Chellapilla is an exceptionally experienced Emergency Medicine consultant with 26 years of exemplary service in managing acute neurological and cardiovascular emergencies. Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Pediatric Surgeon with 24 years of extensive experience in Neonatal and Congenital Surgery. Dr. Priya Iyer is a renowned Pediatric Surgical Oncologist with 18 years of specialized experience in managing childhood malignancies. Dr. Vikram Singh Tomar is a highly skilled Pediatric Urologist and Pediatric Surgeon with 22 years of dedicated practice in pediatric urology and reconstructive surgery. Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Senior Consultant in Pediatric Cardiology with 28 years of clinical expertise. Dr. Priya Malhotra is a Consultant Pediatric Cardiologist with 15 years of experience, specializing in fetal and neonatal cardiac imaging. Dr. Arun Krishnan Nair is a Senior Consultant specializing in pediatric arrhythmias and electrophysiology, with 22 years of clinical experience. Dr. Sneha Gupta is a Consultant in Pediatric Cardiology with 12 years of experience, focusing on rheumatic heart disease and post-operative cardiac management. Dr. Vikram Singh Rathore is an accomplished Consultant specializing in pediatric heart failure and transplantation, with 18 years of expertise. Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a highly experienced Neonatologist with 28 years of specialized experience in NICU care at Apollo Children's Hospital, Hyderabad. She completed her MBBS and MD in Pediatrics from Gandhi Medical College, Hyderabad, followed by a specialized DM in Pediatric Neurology from AIIMS Delhi. Dr. Priya Desai is a highly experienced Consultant Obstetrician & Gynecologist specializing in High-Risk Pregnancy and Maternal-Fetal Medicine at Care Women & Children Hospital. Dr. Rajesh Kumar Sharma is a distinguished Neonatologist with 28 years of extensive clinical experience in managing critically ill newborns. Subsequently, she obtained her DM in Pediatric Neurology from AIIMS Delhi and completed a specialized fellowship in Epilepsy Management at the National Institute of Mental Health and Neurosciences (NIMHANS), Bangalore. Dr. Verma has expertise in managing complex seizure disorders, developmental delay, cerebral palsy, and neurodevelopmental conditions. She has established a comprehensive epilepsy clinic with video-EEG monitoring facilities and has successfully managed over 1,800 pediatric neurological cases. Her research interests include status epilepticus management and pharmacotherapy in drug-resistant epilepsy.
